name: Aberrant Tumor
prerequisites: Aberrant bloodline.
benefit: To the surprise of others, that strange growth on you is actually your spellcasting companion.

name: Ability Focus
prerequisites: Special attack.
benefit: One of this creature's special attacks is particularly difficult to resist.

name: Abundant Revelations
prerequisites: Mystery class feature.
benefit: You can plumb the depths of your mystery to use your revelations more often.

name: Accursed
prerequisites: You must carry a curse that can be lifted only by a quest or similar great undertaking, or have the Cursed Birth background.
benefit: Your curse weighs down your soul like a millstone around your neck.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must carry a curse that can be lifted only by a quest or similar great undertaking
or have the Cursed Birth background

name: Accursed Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, ability to cast bestow curse or major curse, caster level 9th.
benefit: Your spells carry an embedded curse that manifests when they strike true.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to cast bestow curse or major curse

name: Accursed Hex
prerequisites: Hex class feature.
benefit: You can make a second attempt at failed hexes.

name: Accursed Hex, Mythic
prerequisites: Accursed Hex.
benefit: Your hexes flare with persistent potency.

name: Acrobatic
benefit: You are skilled at leaping, jumping, and flying.

name: Acrobatic Steps
prerequisites: Dex 15, Nimble Moves.
benefit: You can easily move over and through obstacles.

name: Acrobatic, Mythic
prerequisites: Acrobatic.
benefit: Your grace and fluidity are beyond compare.

name: Adaptive Fortune
benefit: Your luck takes on almost legendary proportions.

name: Adder Strike
prerequisites: Poison use class feature, Craft (alchemy) 1 rank, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: You can quickly apply poison to gloved hands, protected feet, or other protected body parts, delivering the poison with your unarmed strikes.

name: Additional Traits
benefit: You have more traits than normal.

name: Adept Champion
prerequisites: Smite evil class feature, base attack bonus +5.
benefit: You can alter your smite ability, channeling the power of your deity into divine inspiration that grants you greater aptitude for performing  combat maneuvers.

name: Advanced Ranger Trap
prerequisites: Trap class feature, ranger level 5th.
benefit: Your ranger traps are especially difficult to notice and avoid.

name: Agile Maneuvers
benefit: You've learned to use your quickness in place of brute force when performing combat maneuvers.

name: Agile Tongue
benefit: Your long pink tongue is capable of manipulating small items and even stealing objects.

name: Airy Step
benefit: The air responds to your innate elemental nature, protecting you from harm and cushioning your falls.

name: Alertness
benefit: You often notice things that others might miss.

name: Alertness, Mythic
prerequisites: Alertness.
benefit: Your powers of perception surpass everyone's, whether used to observe your surroundings or the intentions of others.

name: Alignment Channel
prerequisites: Ability to channel energy.
benefit: Choose chaos, evil, good, or law. You can channel divine energy to affect outsiders that possess this subtype.

name: Alignment Channel, Mythic
prerequisites: Alignment Channel.
benefit: The power of your faith harms all creatures that follow the alignment you abhor.

name: Allied Spellcaster
prerequisites: Caster level 1st.
benefit: With the aid of an ally, you are skilled at piercing the protections of other creatures with your spells.

name: Amateur Gunslinger
prerequisites: You have no levels in a class that has the grit class feature.
benefit: Although you are not a gunslinger, you have and can use grit.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You have no levels in a class that has the grit

name: Amateur Investigator
prerequisites: Int 13, 1 rank in at least one Knowledge skill, no levels in a class that has the inspiration class feature.
benefit: Your knowledge is more than plain smarts—it's inspired.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: 1 rank in at least one Knowledge skill

parsed_prerequisites.name: no levels in a class that has the inspiration

name: Amateur Swashbuckler
prerequisites: No levels in a class that has the panache class feature.
benefit: Though not a swashbuckler, you have and can use panache.

parsed_prerequisites.name: No levels in a class that has the panache

name: Angel Wings
benefit: Feathered wings sprout from your back.

name: Angelic Blood
benefit: Your blood is infused with holy power.

name: Angelic Flesh
benefit: Your skin shines like burnished metal.

name: Animal Affinity
benefit: You are skilled at working with animals and mounts.

name: Animal Affinity, Mythic
prerequisites: Animal Affinity.
benefit: You have a greater affinity with wild animals, and can speak with them.

name: Animal Soul
prerequisites: Animal companion or mount class feature.
benefit: Your close bond with an animal allows you to use magic that targets animals on yourself.

name: Antagonize
benefit: Whether with biting remarks or hurtful words, you are adept at making creatures angry with you.

name: Anticipate Dodge
prerequisites: Dodge, Mobility; base attack bonus +7, brawler level 4th, or monk level 4th.
benefit: Your knowledge of mobility and your attack prowess allow you to thwart elusive opponents.

name: Aquatic Ancestry
benefit: You favor your outsider ancestry and are better adapted to life in the water.

name: Arc Slinger
prerequisites: Point-Blank Shot, proficient with sling or halfling sling staff.
benefit: You can twirl your sling in a way that maximizes its effectiveness.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: proficient with sling or halfling sling staff

name: Arcane Armor Mastery
prerequisites: Arcane Armor Training, Medium Armor Proficiency, caster level 7th.
benefit: You have mastered the ability to cast spells while wearing armor.

name: Arcane Armor Training
prerequisites: Light Armor Proficiency, caster level 3rd.
benefit: You have learned how to cast spells while wearing armor.

name: Arcane Armor Training, Mythic
prerequisites: Arcane Armor Training.
benefit: You've adapted your spellcasting to overcome limitations of wearing armor.

name: Arcane Blast
prerequisites: Arcane spellcaster, caster level 10th.
benefit: You can convert any spell into an attack.

name: Arcane Blast, Mythic
prerequisites: Arcane Blast.
benefit: You can manipulate raw eldritch energies to do more than just deal damage.

name: Arcane Shield
prerequisites: Arcane spellcaster, caster level 10th.
benefit: You can convert any spell into a defense.

name: Arcane Shield, Mythic
prerequisites: Arcane Shield.
benefit: You sculpt spells into a powerful, enduring arcane barriers.

name: Arcane Strike
prerequisites: Ability to cast arcane spells.
benefit: You draw upon your arcane power to enhance your weapons with magical energy.

name: Arcane Strike, Mythic
prerequisites: Arcane Strike.
benefit: Using your amazing arcane talents, you can deliver devastating blows infused with magical energy.

name: Arcane Talent
prerequisites: Cha 10; elf, half-elf, or gnome.
benefit: Magic is in your blood, and at your fingertips.

name: Arisen
prerequisites: You must have been slain and brought back from the dead, or have the Left to Die or Cursed Birth background.
benefit: Escaping death strengthened your bond to life, but fills you with a need for answers.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have been slain and brought back from the dead

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or have the Left to Die or Cursed Birth background

name: Armor Proficiency, Heavy
prerequisites: Light Armor Proficiency, Medium Armor Proficiency.
benefit: You are skilled at wearing heavy armor.

name: Armor Proficiency, Light
benefit: You are skilled at wearing light armor.

name: Armor Proficiency, Medium
prerequisites: Light Armor Proficiency.
benefit: You are skilled at wearing medium armor.

name: Armor of the Pit
benefit: Your fiendish traits take the form of a protective scaly skin.

name: Ascendant Spell, Mythic
benefit: You have learned how to emulate mythic spells using non-mythic forces.

name: Aspect of the Beast
prerequisites: wild shape class feature, see Special.
benefit: Whether by magic or a curse of your blood, some part of you is more beast than man.

name: Aspect of the Beast, Mythic
prerequisites: Aspect of the Beast.
benefit: Your blood burns with savage fury, giving you bestial powers and abilities.

name: Athletic
benefit: You possess inherent physical prowess.

name: Athletic, Mythic
prerequisites: Athletic.
benefit: You excel far beyond others at acts of physical prowess.

name: Attuned to the Wild
benefit: You share a strong mystic connection with one type of wilderness terrain.

name: Augment Summoning
prerequisites: Spell Focus (conjuration).
benefit: Your summoned creatures are more powerful and robust.

name: Augment Summoning, Mythic
prerequisites: Augment Summoning.
benefit: Your summoning spells bring not mere ordinary beasts, but instead mythic creatures.

name: Awesome Blow
prerequisites: Str 25, Power Attack, Improved Bull Rush, size Large or larger.
benefit: This creature can send opponents flying.

name: Back to Back
prerequisites: Perception 3 ranks.
benefit: Your ally's eyes are your own, and yours are his.

name: Barroom Brawler
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +4.
benefit: You have learned how to mimic the combat tricks and forms of others.

name: Bashing Finish
prerequisites: Improved Shield Bash, Shield Master, Two-Weapon Fighting, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: You follow a powerful blow from your weapon with an opportunistic bash from your shield.

name: Battle Cry
prerequisites: Cha 13; base attack bonus +5 or Perform (act, oratory, or sing) 5 ranks.
benefit: Your shout heartens your allies and encourages them in the fight.

name: Battlefield Healer
prerequisites: You must successfully cast a conjuration (healing) spell on an ally after being hit by an attack of opportunity, or have the Battle, Chaplain, or Healed background.
benefit: In even the fiercest battles, you risk life and limb to save your allies.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must successfully cast a conjuration (healing) spell on an ally after being hit by an attack of opportunity

name: Beast Rider
benefit: You gain the service of a monstrous companion or mount.

name: Befuddling Strike
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: You know just where to strike to temporarily send your enemy into a confused stupor.

name: Believer's Boon
prerequisites: Wis 13, alignment must be within one step of your deity's.
benefit: Your deity rewards you for your faithfulness.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: alignment must be within one step of your deity's

name: Believer's Hands
prerequisites: Wis 13, Believer's Boon, must be lawful good, alignment must be within one step of your deity's.
benefit: You can heal others with a touch of your hand.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: alignment must be within one step of your deity's

name: Bestow Luck
benefit: You are extremely lucky and sometimes your allies are as well.

name: Betrayer
prerequisites: Quick Draw, Persuasive, base attack bonus +3.
benefit: You can charm people into lowering their defenses, allowing you to ambush them more effectively.

name: Binding Throw
prerequisites: Improved Grapple, Improved Trip, Improved Unarmed Strike, Ki Throw.
benefit: You can strike your enemy and use the blow as an opportunity to grab and hold him.

name: Black Cat
benefit: Bad luck befalls those who dare to cross you.

name: Blasting Charge
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +7, ability to cast 2nd-level bloodrager spells, bloodrage class feature.
benefit: You funnel the power of your bloodrage into a strike capable of erupting with arcane power.

name: Blazing Aura
benefit: An inferno rages inside you, causing your body to radiate intense heat.

name: Bleeding Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: Your critical hits cause opponents to bleed profusely.

name: Bleeding Critical, Mythic
prerequisites: Bleeding Critical, Critical Focus (mythic).
benefit: Your deadliest blows unleash rivers of blood.

name: Blessed Striker
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +11, ability to cast divine spells, alignment must be within one step of your deity's.
benefit: You attacks are augmented by the strength of your and your deity's shared alignment.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: alignment must be within one step of your deity's

name: Blighted Critical
prerequisites: Caster level 5th.
benefit: With a critical hit from a spell or spell-like ability, you give the target a minor spellblight.

name: Blighted Critical Mastery
prerequisites: Blighted Critical, caster level 9th.
benefit: You control the type of spellblight your critical hits give your opponent.

name: Blind-Fight
benefit: You are skilled at attacking opponents that you cannot clearly perceive.

name: Blind-Fight, Mythic
prerequisites: Blind-Fight.
benefit: No creature can avoid your preternatural senses.

name: Blinding Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, base attack bonus +15.
benefit: Your critical hits blind your opponents.

name: Blistering Feint
benefit: Your foes flinch from the heat of your weapon, giving you an opportunity to slip past their defenses.

name: Blood Beak
benefit: Your bleed attack is bloody and dangerous.

name: Blood Drinker
benefit: Consuming blood reinvigorates you.

name: Blood Feaster
benefit: Consuming blood gives you superhuman strength.

name: Blood Salvage
benefit: You do not need to drink blood from a living creature to gain healing benefits.

name: Blood Vengeance
benefit: Seeing an ally fall in combat fills you with a raging and murderous fury.

name: Blood of Heroes
benefit: You have a sense of destiny about you and always seem to succeed, even when the odds are against you.

name: Blooded Arcane Strike
prerequisites: Arcane Strike, ability to cast arcane spells, bloodrage class feature.
benefit: Arcane energy guides your devastating attack.

name: Bloody Assault
prerequisites: Str 13, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Sacrificing accuracy, you can inflict bloody wounds that are slow to heal.

name: Bludgeoner
benefit: You can knock foes out cold with just about any blunt instrument.

name: Blundering Defense
benefit: Your feverish and sometimes comical defensive techniques offer enough distraction to aid allies.

name: Boar Ferocity
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Boar Style, Intimidate 6 ranks.
benefit: Your flesh-ripping unarmed strikes terrify your victims.

name: Boar Shred
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Boar Ferocity, Boar Style, Intimidate 9 ranks.
benefit: The wounds you inflict with your unarmed strikes bleed, giving you renewed vigor.

name: Boar Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Intimidate 3 ranks.
benefit: Your sharp teeth and nails rip your foes open.

name: Body Shield
prerequisites: Dex 13, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: With a sly maneuver, you force a grappled opponent into the path of an incoming attack.

name: Bodyguard
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes.
benefit: Your swift strikes ward off enemies attacking nearby allies.

name: Bolstered Resilience
prerequisites: Damage reduction.
benefit: You can dramatically increase your damage reduction in exchange for its temporary loss.

name: Bonebreaker
prerequisites: Dex 13, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, Jawbreaker, Stunning Fist, Heal 9 ranks.
benefit: When your opponent is unable to adequately defend against them, your precise unarmed strikes break bone and tear tissue.

name: Bookish Rogue
prerequisites: Minor magic rogue talent.
benefit: Thanks to your preparation, your arcane ability is more varied than most.

name: Born Alone
benefit: You are so tough and vicious that you killed and ate the rest of your litter while still in the womb.

name: Bouncing Spell
benefit: You can direct a failed spell against a different target.

name: Branded for Retribution
prerequisites: Bane class feature.
benefit: You brand an enemy with your bane weapon, making it more vulnerable to your allies' attacks.

name: Breadth of Experience
prerequisites: Dwarf, elf, or gnome; 100+ years old.
benefit: Although still young for your kind, you have a lifetime of knowledge and training.

name: Break Guard
prerequisites: Dex 15, Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Disarm, Two-Weapon Fighting.
benefit: You can use one of your two weapons to occupy your opponent's defenses while attacking with the other.

name: Brew Potion
prerequisites: Caster level 3rd.
benefit: You can create magic potions.

name: Brewmaster
benefit: You can concoct potent brews.

name: Broken Wing Gambit
prerequisites: Bluff 5 ranks.
benefit: You feign weakness, making yourself a tempting and distracting target.

name: Bull Rush Strike
prerequisites: Str 13, Improved Bull Rush, Power Attack, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Your critical hits can push back your foes.

name: Bullying Blow
benefit: With a simple hit, you more easily intimidate an opponent.

name: Burn! Burn! Burn!
benefit: You take the goblin love of arson and fire play to a whole new level.

name: Burning Spell
benefit: You cause creatures to take extra damage when you affect them with a spell that has the acid or fire descriptor.

name: Burrowing Teeth
benefit: You have teeth and claws that suit you well to digging.

name: Canny Tumble
prerequisites: Dodge, Mobility, Acrobatics 5 ranks.
benefit: Your acrobatic prowess distracts your foes.

name: Carrion Feeder
benefit: Like many scavengers, you can stomach foods that would make weaker creatures ill.

name: Cartwheel Dodge
prerequisites: Evasion class feature, improved evasion class feature, acrobatics 12 ranks.
benefit: You use your knack for avoiding damage to reposition yourself in combat.

name: Casual Illusionist
benefit: You can use your innate magic to create minor illusions that augment your efforts at trickery and deceit.

name: Catch Off-Guard
benefit: Foes are surprised by your skilled use of unorthodox and improvised weapons.

name: Catch Off-Guard, Mythic
prerequisites: Catch Off-Guard.
benefit: In your hands, anything is a deadly weapon.

name: Catfolk Exemplar
benefit: Your feline traits are more defined and prominent than those of other members of your race.

name: Cautious Fighter
benefit: You care more about survival than victory.

name: Cavalry Formation
prerequisites: Mounted Combat.
benefit: You are skilled at riding in close formation with your mounted allies without impeding your effectiveness on the battlefield.

name: Celestial Servant
benefit: Rather than being a normal animal or beast, your companion or familiar hails from the heavenly realms.

name: Champion
prerequisites: You must have defeated a single challenging foe without any aid from another, or have the Champion of a God, Champion of the People, Competition Champion, or Gladiator background.
benefit: You must prove yourself through single combat.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have defeated a single challenging foe without any aid from another

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or have the Champion of a God

name: Channel Force
benefit: Your channel is bolstered by your faith, allowing you to move and damage your foes.

name: Channel Smite
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature.
benefit: You can channel your divine energy through a melee weapon you wield.

name: Channel Smite, Mythic
prerequisites: Channel Smite.
benefit: Your weapon a conduit of divine energy.

name: Channeled Blessing
prerequisites: Blessings class feature, channel energy class feature.
benefit: Your channeled energy can deliver a warpriest's blessing.

name: Channeled Revival
prerequisites: Channel energy 6d6 (positive energy).
benefit: You can expend a large portion of your channeling power to reverse death itself.

name: Channeled Shield Wall
prerequisites: Channel energy, 3d6 proficiency with a shield.
benefit: You draw upon your channel energy to enhance the protective ability of your shield and those of allies while they are adjacent to you.

name: Channeling Force
prerequisites: Ability to cast at least one force spell, channel energy class feature.
benefit: You distill your channeled energy into a sheen of force that surrounds your weapon for a limited time.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Ability to cast at least one force spell

name: Channeling Scourge
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature, inquisitor level 1st.
benefit: Your zeal for hunting your faith's enemies empowers your ability to channel divine energy, as long as you channel that energy for harm.

name: Charge Through
prerequisites: Str 13, Improved Overrun, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You can overrun enemies when charging.

name: Charge Through, Mythic
prerequisites: Charge Through.
benefit: You can plow through those who stand between you and the target of your charge.

name: Charging Hurler
prerequisites: Point-Blank Shot.
benefit: You know how to use your momentum to enhance your thrown weapon attacks.

name: Childlike
prerequisites: Cha 13, halfling.
benefit: Your resemblance to a human child tends to make others trust you, perhaps more than they should.

name: Chokehold
prerequisites: Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +6 or monk level 5th.
benefit: While grappling, you can cut off an opponent's air and blood supply.

name: Claw Pounce
benefit: You can charge and make an attack with your paws.

name: Cleave
prerequisites: Str 13, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You can strike two adjacent foes with a single swing.

name: Cleave Through
benefit: You are ferocious at hewing smaller opponents.

name: Cleave, Mythic
prerequisites: Cleave.
benefit: You can cleave any foe within your reach.

name: Cleaving Finish
prerequisites: Str 13, Cleave, Power Attack.
benefit: When you strike down an opponent, you can continue your swing into another target.

name: Close-Quarters Thrower
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge, Weapon Focus with selected thrown weapon.
benefit: You are agile enough to avoid melee attacks while throwing weapons or bombs.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Weapon Focus with selected thrown weapon

name: Cloud Gazer
benefit: Your insight into your elemental heritage gives you a clarity of sight few humans possess.

name: Cloud Step
prerequisites: Spider Step, monk level 12th.
benefit: Your tread is of unearthly lightness.

name: Cloven Helm
benefit: Your helm turns aside lethal blows.

name: Clustered Shots
prerequisites: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You take a moment to carefully aim your shots, causing them all to strike nearly the same spot.

name: Cockatrice Strike
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Gorgon's Fist, Medusa's Wrath, base attack bonus +16.
benefit: With a single strike, you transmute flesh to stone.

name: Combat Casting
benefit: You are adept at spellcasting when threatened or distracted.

name: Combat Expertise
prerequisites: Int 13.
benefit: You can increase your defense at the expense of your accuracy.

name: Combat Expertise, Mythic
prerequisites: Combat Expertise.
benefit: You can dart out of the way of attacks with skill and defiance.

name: Combat Medic
prerequisites: Heal 5 ranks.
benefit: You know the urgency of treating wounds in the heat of battle, applying first aid to your allies with such speed that you assure no one gets left behind.

name: Combat Patrol
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes, Mobility, base attack bonus +5.
benefit: You range across the battlefield, dealing with threats wherever they arise.

name: Combat Reflexes
benefit: You can make additional attacks of opportunity.

name: Combat Reflexes, Mythic
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes.
benefit: You strike viciously whenever your foe gives you an opening.

name: Combat Style Master
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, two or more style feats, base attack bonus +6 or monk level 5th.
benefit: You shift between combat styles, combining them to increased effect.

name: Command Undead
prerequisites: Channel negative energy class feature.
benefit: Using foul powers of necromancy, you can command undead creatures, making them into your servants.

name: Command Undead, Mythic
prerequisites: Command Undead.
benefit: Your control of the undead is nearly absolute.

name: Concussive Spell
benefit: You cause creatures to be disoriented when you affect them with a spell that has the sonic descriptor.

name: Confounding Tumble Deed
prerequisites: Amateur Swashbuckler feat or panache class feature, Canny Tumble, Acrobatics 7 ranks.
benefit: You can befuddle a foe by striking a blow after tumbling.

name: Contingent Channeling
prerequisites: True healer class feature, Selective Channeling.
benefit: You can imbue others with your healing energy so that they can use it at the moment of greatest need.

name: Cooperative Crafting
prerequisites: 1 rank in any Craft skill, any item creation feat.
benefit: Your assistance makes item crafting far more efficient.

name: Coordinated Charge
prerequisites: You have at least two other teamwork feats, base attack bonus +10.
benefit: You are an expert at leading your allies into the fray.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You have at least two other teamwork feats

name: Coordinated Defense
benefit: You are adept at working with allies to avoid being tripped, grappled, and subjected to other maneuvers.

name: Coordinated Maneuvers
benefit: You are skilled at working with your allies to perform dangerous combat maneuvers.

name: Coordinated Shot
prerequisites: Point-Blank Shot.
benefit: Your ranged attacks against an opponent take advantage of your ally's positioning.

name: Cosmopolitan
benefit: Living in large, exotic cities has put you in touch with many diverse civilizations, cultures, and races.

name: Counter Reflexes
prerequisites: Anticipate Dodge, Dodge, Mobility; base attack bonus +9, brawler level 6th, or monk level 6th.
benefit: Your opponent's advanced training in moving around you is surpassed only by your readiness for it.

name: Counterpunch
prerequisites: Dex 18, Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike, Weapon Focus (unarmed strike); base attack bonus +16 or brawler level 12th.
benefit: With deft reflexes, you capitalize on opponents' mistake.

name: Courageous Resolve
benefit: Even when others run, you tend to stand your ground.

name: Covering Defense
prerequisites: Shield Focus, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You are skilled at protecting yourself and your allies with your shield.

name: Craft Construct
prerequisites: Caster level 5th, Craft Magic Arms and Armor, Craft Wondrous Item.
benefit: You can create construct creatures like golems.

name: Craft Magic Arms and Armor
prerequisites: Caster level 5th.
benefit: You can create magic armor, shields, and weapons.

name: Craft Rod
prerequisites: Caster level 9th.
benefit: You can create magic rods.

name: Craft Staff
prerequisites: Caster level 11th.
benefit: You can create magic staves.

name: Craft Wand
prerequisites: Caster level 5th.
benefit: You can create magic wands.

name: Craft Wondrous Item
prerequisites: Caster level 3rd.
benefit: You can create wondrous items, a type of magic item.

name: Crane Riposte
prerequisites: Crane Style, Crane Wing, Dodge, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8 or monk level 7th.
benefit: You use your defensive abilities to make overpowering counterattacks.

name: Crane Style
prerequisites: Dodge, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +2 or monk level 1st.
benefit: Your unarmed fighting techniques blend poise with graceful defense.

name: Crane Wing
prerequisites: Crane Style, Dodge, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +5 or monk level 5th.
benefit: You move with the speed and finesse of an avian hunter, your sweeping blocks and graceful motions allowing you to def lect melee attacks with ease.

name: Create Reliquary Arms and Shields
prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, ability to cast consecrate or desecrate.
benefit: Your magical creations are infused with divine power.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to cast consecrate or desecrate

name: Create Sanguine Elixir
prerequisites: Cha 15, Brew Potion, Craft (alchemy) 12 ranks, sorcerer level 3rd.
benefit: You can condense a fraction of your bloodline's power into a powerful elixir.

name: Crippling Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, base attack bonus +13.
benefit: You are able to maim a target and hinder its movement.

name: Critical Focus
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +9.
benefit: You are trained in the art of causing pain.

name: Critical Focus, Mythic
prerequisites: Critical Focus.
benefit: Your blows unerringly find your target's vital spots.

name: Critical Mastery
prerequisites: Critical Focus, any two critical feats, 14th-level fighter.
benefit: Your critical hits cause two additional effects.

name: Critical Mastery, Mythic
prerequisites: Critical Focus (mythic), Critical Mastery.
benefit: Your critical hits are versatile and devastating.

name: Critical Versatility
benefit: An open mind and combat training grant versatility to your critical hits.

name: Crossbow Mastery
prerequisites: Dex 15, Point-Blank Shot, Rapid Reload, Rapid Shot.
benefit: You can load crossbows with blinding speed and even fire them in melee with little fear of reprisal.

name: Crusader's Fist
prerequisites: Lay on hands class feature or touch of corruption class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You pour divine energy into the enemy you strike.

name: Crusader's Flurry
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature, flurry of blows class feature, Weapon Focus with your deity's favored melee weapon.
benefit: You learned to use your deity's favored weapon as part of your martial arts form.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Weapon Focus with your deity's favored melee weapon

name: Crushing Blow
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Stunning Fist.
benefit: Your focus allows you to smash your enemy's defenses.

name: Damned
prerequisites: You must have had friendly contact with an evil-aligned outsider that would qualify as a challenging foe, have a fiend-related sorcerous bloodline such as abyssal or infernal, have direct fiendish ancestry (such as being a tiefling or half-fiend), or have the Fiend Raised or The Fiend background.
benefit: From your earliest days, you were destined to sacrifice everything in your quest for power.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must have had friendly contact with an evil-aligned outsider that would qualify as a challenging foe
have a fiend-related sorcerous bloodline such as abyssal or infernal
have direct fiendish ancestry (such as being a tiefling or half-fiend)
or have the Fiend Raised or The Fiend background

name: Dark Sight
benefit: With further modification, your eyes can pierce the gloom of even magical darkness.

name: Dastardly Finish
prerequisites: Sneak attack +5d6.
benefit: You can take advantage of an enemy's debilitated state to attempt a coup de grace.

name: Dastardly Finish, Mythic
prerequisites: Dastardly Finish.
benefit: You strike downed, dazed, and staggered opponents with deadly efficiency.

name: Dauntless Destiny
benefit: Your ability to avert disaster is impressive.

name: Dazing Assault
prerequisites: Str 13, Power Attack, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: You can daze foes with wild attacks.

name: Dazing Fist
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +4.
benefit: You know just where to strike to daze your foe.

name: Dazing Spell
benefit: You can daze creatures with the power of your spells.

name: Dazzling Display
prerequisites: Weapon Focus, proficiency with the selected weapon.
benefit: Your skill with your favored weapon can frighten enemies.

name: Dazzling Display, Mythic
prerequisites: Dazzling Display.
benefit: You can quickly deter others with your martial mastery.

name: Deadly Aim
prerequisites: Dex 13, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You can make exceptionally deadly ranged attacks by pinpointing a foe's weak spot, at the expense of making the attack less likely to succeed.

name: Deadly Aim, Mythic
prerequisites: Deadly Aim.
benefit: Your aim is truly devastating.

name: Deadly Finish
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +11.
benefit: Your attacks don't just fell your opponents—they kill them outright.

name: Deadly Stroke
prerequisites: Dazzling Display, Greater Weapon Focus, Shatter Defenses, Weapon Focus, proficiency with the selected weapon, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: With a well-placed strike, you can bring a swift and painful end to most foes.

name: Deadly Stroke, Mythic
prerequisites: Deadly Stroke.
benefit: You can kill with a single stroke.

name: Deafening Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, base attack bonus +13.
benefit: Your critical hits cause enemies to lose their hearing.

name: Deafening Explosion
benefit: Your bombs explode with deafening force.

name: Death from Above
benefit: You allow gravity to add extra force to your charges.

name: Death from Above, Mythic
prerequisites: Death from Above.
benefit: When attacking from the air or higher ground, you bear down on your enemy to deadly effect.

name: Death or Glory
prerequisites: Str 13, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Even when facing a larger foe, you aren't afraid to take great risks in order to finish the fight.

name: Deathless Initiate
prerequisites: Str 13, Con 13, orc or half-orc, Diehard, Endurance, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: For you, impending death is a call to wrath.

name: Deathless Master
prerequisites: Str 13, Con 15, orc or half-orc, Deathless Initiate, Diehard, Endurance, Ironhide**, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Even if you suffer a grievous wound, you can shrug off the damage and continue your relentless assault.

name: Deathless Zealot
prerequisites: Str 13, Con 17, orc or half-orc, Deathless Initiate, Deathless Master, Diehard, Endurance, Ironhide**, base attack bonus +12.
benefit: Only the most serious wounds can stop you.

name: Deceitful
benefit: You are skilled at deceiving others, both with the spoken word and with physical disguises.

name: Deceitful, Mythic
prerequisites: Deceitful.
benefit: Your power to mislead is beyond compare.

name: Deceptive Exchange
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Feint.
benefit: You trick an adversary into grabbing an object you hand them, even in the midst of combat.

name: Deep Drinker
prerequisites: Con 13, monk level 11, drunken ki class feature.
benefit: You draw greater amounts of ki from your libations.

name: Deepsight
prerequisites: Darkvision 60 feet.
benefit: Your senses are especially keen in the utter darkness.

name: Deepsight, Mythic
prerequisites: Deepsight.
benefit: Your sharp eyes can penetrate deeper into the darkness, revealing more to you.

name: Defending Eidolon
prerequisites: Shield ally feature.
benefit: You have trained your eidolon to protect you.

name: Defensive Combat Training
benefit: You excel at defending yourself from all manner of combat maneuvers.

name: Defensive Combat Training, Mythic
prerequisites: Defensive Combat Training, 4th mythic tier.
benefit: Your defensive capabilities in combat are unmatched.

name: Defensive Weapon Training
prerequisites: Int 13, base attack bonus +5.
benefit: You know how to defend yourself against a certain class of weaponry.

name: Defiant Luck
benefit: You can sometimes defiantly shrug off spells and attacks that would kill a lesser creature.

name: Deflect Arrows
prerequisites: Dex 13, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: You can knock arrows and other projectiles off course, preventing them from hitting you.

name: Deflect Arrows, Mythic
prerequisites: Deflect Arrows.
benefit: You deflect projectiles and ray spells with uncanny skill.

name: Deft Hands
benefit: You have exceptional manual dexterity.

name: Deft Hands, Mythic
prerequisites: Deft Hands.
benefit: Your hands are astonishingly nimble.

name: Deft Shootist Deed
prerequisites: Grit class feature or Amateur Gunslinger feat, Dodge, Mobility.
benefit: You keep an eye out while focusing on your weapon, allowing you to avoid attacks while shooting and reloading firearms.

name: Demoralizing Lash
benefit: You cow your enemies with the lash of a whip.

name: Dented Helm
benefit: Your helm protects you from hard hits.

name: Deny Death
prerequisites: Ki pool, Endurance
benefit: Your ki is so strong that it can deny death.

name: Deny the Reaper
prerequisites: You must have witnessed the death of a close companion in battle—a death that could have been prevented, such as from bleeding, failure to stabilize, or ongoing poison damage—or have the Death in the Family or The War background.
benefit: The lives you could not save stay with you to your final breath.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have witnessed the death of a close companion in battle&mdash

parsed_prerequisites.detail: a death that could have been prevented
or have the Death in the Family or The War background

name: Desperate Swing
benefit: You land your most telling blows in desperate situations.

name: Destroyer's Blessing
benefit: Breaking things adds to your power.

name: Destructive Dispel
prerequisites: Ability to cast dispel magic or greater dispel magic, caster level 11th.
benefit: When you dispel an enemy's magical defenses, those defenses crash down with debilitating effects.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Ability to cast dispel magic or greater dispel magic

name: Detect Expertise
prerequisites: Int 13; ability to cast detect chaos, detect evil, detect good, detect law, or detect magic.
benefit: You can detect the mystic specialty of a foe.

name: Detect Expertise, Mythic
prerequisites: Detect Expertise.
benefit: You can sense a creature's magical abilities with just a mere glance.

name: Devastating Strike
prerequisites: Vital Strike, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Pitting all of your strength and resolve against your enemy, you deliver a strike that is impossible to ignore.

name: Die for Your Master
prerequisites: Tumor familiar alchemist discovery.
benefit: Your tumor familiar goes to any length to save your life.

name: Diehard
prerequisites: Endurance.
benefit: You are especially hard to kill. Not only do your wounds automatically stabilize when grievously injured, but you can remain conscious and continue to act even at death's door.

name: Dimensional Agility
prerequisites: Ability to use the abundant step class feature or cast dimension door.
benefit: Teleportation does not faze you.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Ability to use the abundant step

name: Dimensional Assault
prerequisites: Ability to use the abundant step class feature or cast dimension door, Dimensional Agility.
benefit: You have been trained to use magical movement as part of your combat tactics.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Ability to use the abundant step

name: Dimensional Dervish
prerequisites: Ability to use the abundant step class feature or cast dimension door, Dimensional Agility, Dimensional Assault, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You teleport with a mere thought, savaging your opponents as you flash in and out of reality.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Ability to use the abundant step

name: Dimensional Maneuvers
prerequisites: Ability to use the abundant step class feature or cast dimension door, Dimensional Agility, Dimensional Assault, Dimensional Dervish, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Your rapid teleportation makes your combat maneuvers more difficult to avoid.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Ability to use the abundant step

name: Dimensional Savant
prerequisites: Dimensional Agility, Dimensional Assault, Dimensional Dervish, ability to use the abundant step class feature or cast dimension door, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: You flash into and out of reality so quickly it is impossible to tell exactly where you are at any given time.

parsed_prerequisites.name: ability to use the abundant step

name: Disable Dweomer
prerequisites: Disable Device 5 ranks, Use Magic Device 5 ranks, trapfinding.
benefit: You can disable a magic item, suppressing it for a short time.

name: Disarming Strike
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Disarm, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Your critical hits can disarm your foes.

name: Disarming Threat Deed
prerequisites: Amateur Swashbuckler or panache class feature; Diplomacy 2 ranks, Intimidate 2 ranks.
benefit: Even your threats are curiously charming.

name: Discerning Eye
benefit: You are not easily fooled by illusions and forgeries.

name: Discordant Voice
prerequisites: Bardic performance class feature, Perform (oratory or sing) 10 ranks.
benefit: By singing out a precise tone, you cause discordant vibrations to run through allies' weapons.

name: Disengaging Feint
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Feint.
benefit: You can feint to disengage from combat.

name: Disengaging Flourish
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Disengaging Feint, Improved Feint.
benefit: Distracting your opponents gives you the opportunity to make a swift retreat.

name: Disengaging Shot
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Disengaging Feint, Dodge, Improved Feint, Mobility.
benefit: You make one last attack before beating a hasty retreat.

name: Disheartening Display
prerequisites: Dazzling Display, Weapon Focus, base attack bonus +6, proficiency with chosen weapon.
benefit: Your show of prowess further demoralizes others.

name: Disorienting Maneuver
prerequisites: Dodge, Acrobatics 5 ranks.
benefit: Your erratic movements disorient your opponent.

name: Dispel Synergy
prerequisites: Spellcraft 5 ranks.
benefit: By tearing away an opponent's magical defenses, you leave your enemy vulnerable, making it difficult for him to resist your spells.

name: Dispelling Critical
prerequisites: Arcane Strike, base attack bonus +11, ability to cast dispel magic.
benefit: Your blows attack the physical and arcane forms of your enemies at the same time.

name: Dispelling Fist
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +11, ability to cast dispel magic, caster level 7th.
benefit: By focusing on your knowledge of magic and spells that negate its powers, you use your bare hands to rip magical defenses from your enemy.

name: Disposable Weapon
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +1, proficient with weapon.
benefit: You ignore the limitations of your equipment, striking harder despite the damage it does to your weapon.

name: Disrupting Shot
prerequisites: Dex 13, Point-Blank Shot, fighter level 6th.
benefit: With a well-placed shot, you make it harder for a nearby opponent to cast spells.

name: Disruptive
prerequisites: 6th-level fighter.
benefit: Your training makes it difficult for enemy spellcasters to safely cast spells near you.

name: Disruptive Recall
prerequisites: Spell recall class feature, Spellcraft 5 ranks.
benefit: You can disrupt an enemy caster's spells to fuel your own arcane power.

name: Disruptive Spell
benefit: Your magical energies cling to enemies, interfering with their spellcasting.

name: Disruptive, Mythic
prerequisites: Disruptive.
benefit: You're a master at disrupting nearby spellcasters.

name: Distance Thrower
prerequisites: Str 13.
benefit: You are accurate with thrown weapons at longer ranges than normal.

name: Distance Thrower, Mythic
prerequisites: Str 17, Distance Thrower.
benefit: There's virtually no limit to your powerful throwing arm.

name: Distracting Charge
benefit: Your ally's charge exposes an opening you can exploit.

name: Diverse Palate
benefit: Your taste for blood is broader than that of other dhampirs.

name: Divine Interference
prerequisites: Divine spellcaster, caster level 10th.
benefit: You can convert a spell to interfere with an enemy's attack.

name: Divine Interference, Mythic
prerequisites: Divine Interference.
benefit: Your divine power thwarts enemies of your faith.

name: Divine Protection
prerequisites: Cha 13, Knowledge (religion) 5 ranks, ability to cast 2nd-level divine spells; blessings, domains, or mystery class feature.
benefit: Your deity protects you against deadly attacks.

name: Diviner's Delving
prerequisites: Spell Focus (divination).
benefit: Your keen magical intuition makes reading signs, portents, and mystical clues quick and easy.

name: Djinni Spin
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 17, Djinni Style, Djinni Spirit, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +13 or monk level 11th.
benefit: You can surround yourself with the power of the storm, spinning like a hurricane to unleash a violent blast of electrical energy.

name: Djinni Spirit
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 15, Djinni Style, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +11 or monk level 9th.
benefit: By calling upon the spirits of storms, you can manipulate lightning to protect yourself and buffet your enemies with peals of thunder.

name: Djinni Style
prerequisites: Con 13, Wis 15, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 5th.
benefit: Your hands sheathed in an auras of lightning, you move like the wind.

name: Dodge
prerequisites: Dex 13.
benefit: Your training and reflexes allow you to react swiftly to avoid an opponents' attacks.

name: Dodge, Mythic
prerequisites: Dodge.
benefit: When focused, you become nearly impossible to strike.

name: Domain Strike
prerequisites: Domain class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: You unleash a domain power upon your enemy as part of your unarmed strike.

name: Double Bane
prerequisites: Bane class feature, Two-Weapon Fighting.
benefit: You extend your bane effect to two weapons.

name: Double Slice
prerequisites: Dex 15, Two-Weapon Fighting.
benefit: Your off-hand weapon while dual-wielding strikes with greater power.

name: Draconic Aspect
benefit: You possess some of the qualities of your dragon ancestors.

name: Draconic Breath
benefit: You possess draconic defenses and a draconic breath weapon.

name: Draconic Glide
benefit: You possess draconic defenses and wings that allow you to glide.

name: Draconic Paragon
benefit: You can shrug off sleep and paralysis effects as well as any dragon, and your draconic aspects improve.

name: Drag Down
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Trip.
benefit: When you are knocked prone, you are skilled at bringing your opponent down with you.

name: Dragon Ferocity
prerequisites: Str 15, Improved Unarmed Strike, Dragon Style, Stunning Fist, Acrobatics 5 ranks.
benefit: You attack with the strength of a dragon, your telling blows striking fear into your enemies.

name: Dragon Roar
prerequisites: Str 15, Improved Unarmed Strike, Dragon Style, Stunning Fist, Acrobatics 8 ranks.
benefit: The spirit of the dragon wells up inside you and bursts forth in a mighty roar.

name: Dragon Style
prerequisites: Str 15, Improved Unarmed Strike, Acrobatics 3 ranks.
benefit: You call upon the spirit of dragonkind, gaining greater resilience, mobility, and fierceness from the blessing of these great beings.

name: Dragonbane Aura
prerequisites: Aura of courage class feature, caster level 8th.
benefit: Those within your dragonbane aura gain the same protection that you do.

name: Draining Strike
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: With a well-aimed strike, you cause your target to become fatigued or exhausted.

name: Dramatic Display
prerequisites: Dazzling Display.
benefit: Your skill with your weapon is obvious to enemies and onlookers alike.

name: Dreadful Carnage
prerequisites: Str 15, Power Attack, Furious Focus, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: Slaying an enemy demoralizes your other nearby foes.

name: Dreadful Carnage, Mythic
prerequisites: Dreadful Carnage.
benefit: Your kills are truly frightening to behold.

name: Drink Is Life, Mythic
prerequisites: Con 19, 3rd mythic tier.
benefit: Strong drink fuels the mythic fires within you.

name: Drow Nobility
benefit: Your blood courses with power, granting you greater spell-like abilities.

name: Dual Enhancement
prerequisites: Two-Weapon Fighting; divine bond (weapon) or sacred weapon class feature.
benefit: You can enhance two weapons, or both ends of a double weapon, with a single act.

name: Dual Path, Mythic
prerequisites: 1st mythic tier.
benefit: You follow two mythic paths.

name: Duck and Cover
benefit: Your allies assist you in avoiding certain attacks.

name: Dueling Cape
prerequisites: Dodge, Sleight of Hand 1 rank.
benefit: You can use a simple cape to guard yourself and confound your foes.

name: Dwarf Blooded
benefit: You have dwarven blood coursing through your veins.

name: Eagle Eyes
prerequisites: Wis 13, keen senses racial trait.
benefit: Your vision is especially keen.

name: Eagle Eyes, Mythic
prerequisites: Eagle Eyes.
benefit: You eyesight rivals that of the most far-seeing raptors.

name: Earth Child Binder
prerequisites: Wis 13, dwarf or gnome, defensive training racial trait, Earth Child Style, Earth Child Topple, Greater Trip, Improved Trip, Improved Unarmed Strike, Stunning Fist, Acrobatics 9 ranks.
benefit: Even the greatest giants fear your technique.

name: Earth Child Style
prerequisites: Wis 13, dwarf or gnome, defensive training racial trait, Improved Unarmed Strike, Acrobatics 3 ranks.
benefit: Your martial training makes you a dangerous and elusive target for giants.

name: Earth Child Topple
prerequisites: Wis 13, dwarf or gnome, defensive training racial trait, Earth Child Style, Improved Trip, Improved Unarmed Strike, Acrobatics 6 ranks.
benefit: Your mastery of balance and momentum allows you to bring down giants with your bare hands.

name: Echoes of Stone
benefit: Your senses are keener among the rocks and stones.

name: Echoing Spell
benefit: You have learned how to release most, but not all, of a spell's potential when you cast it.

name: Eclectic
prerequisites: Human.
benefit: You have a talent for picking up different vocations.

name: Ectoplasmic Spell
benefit: Your spells breach the gulf between dimensions, sending ghostly emanations into the ether.

name: Efreeti Stance
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 15, Efreeti Style, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +11 or monk level 9th.
benefit: Calling upon the burning spirits of  incarnate flame, you can manipulate fire to protect yourself and immolate  your foes.

name: Efreeti Style
prerequisites: Con 13, Wis 15, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 5th.
benefit: Your mastery of the unpredictable power of flames allows you to unleash scorching strikes that burn your enemies even when you fail to make contact.

name: Efreeti Touch
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 17, Efreeti Style, Efreeti Stance, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +13 or monk level 11th.
benefit: Your knowledge of the secrets of the burning wind and blazing sun allows you to collect flames into your hands and unleash them in a gout of elemental fire.

name: Eldritch Claws
prerequisites: Str 15, natural weapons, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Who needs magic weapons? Eldritch tricks are no match for your bestial ferocity.

name: Eldritch Heritage
prerequisites: Cha 13, Skill Focus with the class skill of bloodline selected for this feat (see below), character level 3rd.
benefit: You are descended from a long line of sorcerers, and some portion of their power flows in your veins.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Skill Focus with the class skill of bloodline selected for this feat (see below)

name: Eldritch Heritage, Mythic
prerequisites: Eldritch Heritage.
benefit: The blood of your sorcerous ancestor mingles with your mythic power to great effect.

name: Eldritch Researcher
prerequisites: You must have created a new spell, or have The Way Things Work background.
benefit: You seek new applications for magical energy.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have created a new spell

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or have The Way Things Work background

name: Elemental Channel
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature.
benefit: Choose one elemental subtype, such as air, earth, fire, or water. You can channel your divine energy to harm or heal outsiders that possess your chosen elemental subtype.

name: Elemental Channel, Mythic
prerequisites: Elemental Channel.
benefit: Your power over elemental beings is nearly absolute.

name: Elemental Fist
prerequisites: Con 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: You empower your strike with elemental energy

name: Elemental Fist, Mythic
prerequisites: Elemental Fist.
benefit: Your ability to channel elemental power through your unarmed attacks is ferociously potent.

name: Elemental Focus
benefit: Your spells of a certain element are more difficult to resist.

name: Elemental Focus, Mythic
prerequisites: Elemental Focus.
benefit: Your elemental spells are potent and effective.

name: Elemental Jaunt
benefit: The spirits of your ancestral home call to you, beckoning you to return.

name: Elemental Spell
benefit: You can manipulate the elemental nature of your spells.

name: Elusive Redirection
prerequisites: Elusive target class feature, Combat Expertise, Improved Unarmed Strike, flowing monk level 12th.
benefit: You can redirect an attack back at your assailant or into an adjacent enemy.

name: Elven Accuracy
prerequisites: Elf.
benefit: Your sharp eyesight makes difficult shots easier.

name: Elven Accuracy, Mythic
prerequisites: Elven Accuracy.
benefit: Your elven eyesight cuts though concealment.

name: Elven Battle Training
benefit: You have been specially trained to wield a variety of traditional elven weapons.

name: Elven Spirit
benefit: Although you are of mixed heritage, you are closer to your elven relatives and the magic in their blood flows freely in your veins.

name: Empower Spell
benefit: You can increase the power of your spells, causing them to deal more damage.

name: Empower Spell-Like Ability
prerequisites: Spell-like ability at caster level 6th or higher.
benefit: One of this creature's spell-like abilities is particularly potent and powerful.

name: Endurance
benefit: Harsh conditions or long exertions do not easily tire you.

name: Endurance, Mythic
prerequisites: Endurance.
benefit: Your endurance is truly beyond the pale.

name: Energy Channel
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature; Air, Earth, Fire, or Water domain or blessing.
benefit: You distill your channeled energy into your weapon to empower it.

name: Enfilading Fire
prerequisites: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, one other teamwork feat.
benefit: Your ranged attacks take advantage of the flanking maneuvers of allies.

name: Enforcer
prerequisites: Intimidate 1 rank.
benefit: You are skilled at causing fear in those you brutalize.

name: Enlarge Spell
benefit: You can increase the range of your spells.

name: Ensemble
prerequisites: Perform 5 ranks
benefit: You can create an ensemble of skilled and amateur performers to aid you in your performance.

name: Escape Route
benefit: You have trained to watch your allies' backs, covering them as they make tactical withdraws.

name: Eschew Materials
benefit: You can cast many spells without needing to utilize minor material components.

name: Eschew Materials, Mythic
prerequisites: Eschew Materials.
benefit: You can cast even the most powerful spells without using material components.

name: Esoteric Linguistics
prerequisites: Skill Focus (Linguistics).
benefit: You can decipher even the most exotic of writings, including those that contain magic.

name: Evolved Companion
prerequisites: Cha 13, animal companion class feature.
benefit: Your animal companion has abilities that makes it different from others of its kind.

name: Evolved Familiar
prerequisites: Int 13, Cha 13, familiar class feature.
benefit: Your familiar is different from others of its kind.

name: Evolved Summoned Monster
prerequisites: Augmented Summoning, Spell Focus (conjuration), ability to cast summon monster I.
benefit: The creatures you summon have evolved to have even greater abilities.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to cast summon monster I

name: Exhausting Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, Tiring Critical, base attack bonus +15.
benefit: Your critical hits cause opponents to become exhausted.

name: Exile's Path
benefit: A lifetime spent shunned by others and eschewing your heritage makes you resistant to efforts to pry inside of your mind.

name: Exotic Weapon Proficiency
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +1.
benefit: Choose one type of exotic weapon, such as the spiked chain or whip. You understand how to use that type of exotic weapon in combat, and can utilize any special tricks or qualities that exotic weapon might allow.

name: Expanded Arcana
prerequisites: Caster level 1st, see Special.
benefit: Your research has revealed new spells.

name: Expanded Fiendish Resistance
benefit: You gain extra fiendish resistances.

name: Expanded Preparation
prerequisites: Arcanist level 1st.
benefit: You can prepare more spells than other arcanists can.

name: Expanded Resistance
benefit: You have expanded your natural resistance to magic to encompass different kinds of magic.

name: Experimental Spellcaster
benefit: Despite casting spells, you dabble in the art of wordcasting.

name: Expert Driver
prerequisites: Skilled Driver with the selected vehicle type.
benefit: When driving a chosen type of vehicle, you exhibit incredible control, maneuvering the vehicle with greater ease and stopping with uncanny precision.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Skilled Driver with the selected vehicle type

name: Exploit Lore
prerequisites: Monster lore class feature, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: You can use your knowledge of a creature's weaknesses to deliver a driving and relentless assault against it.

name: Extend Spell
benefit: You can make your spells last twice as long.

name: Extended Animal Focus
prerequisites: Animal focus class feature.
benefit: Your ability to emulate an animal lingers longer.

name: Extended Bane
prerequisites: Bane class feature.
benefit: Your dedication knows no limit. Your wrath dies hard.

name: Extra Arcana
prerequisites: Magus arcana class feature.
benefit: You have unlocked the secret of a new magus arcana.

name: Extra Arcane Pool
prerequisites: Arcane pool class feature.
benefit: You have learned how to draw more power from your arcane pool.

name: Extra Arcanist Exploit
prerequisites: Arcanist exploit class feature.
benefit: Your repertoire of arcanist exploits expands.

name: Extra Bane
prerequisites: Bane class feature.
benefit: You can use your bane ability more often than normal.

name: Extra Bombs
prerequisites: Bomb class feature.
benefit: You can throw more bombs per day.

name: Extra Cantrips or Orisons
prerequisites: Ability to cast cantrips or orisons.
benefit: You are a master of minor spells.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Ability to cast cantrips or orisons

name: Extra Channel
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature.
benefit: You can channel divine energy more often.

name: Extra Channel
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature.
benefit: You can channel divine energy more often.

name: Extra Discovery
prerequisites: Discovery class feature.
benefit: You have made a new alchemical discovery.

name: Extra Elemental Assault
benefit: You have unlocked greater elemental power.

name: Extra Evolution
prerequisites: Eidolon class feature.

name: Extra Hex

benefit: You have learned the secrets of a new hex.

prerequisites: You must be ordained as a sacred (or profane) champion of your faith by a high-ranking member of its clergy, or have the Devoted, Faith-Bringer, or Moral Debt background. Such an honor goes above and beyond the normal oaths required of a cleric or paladin.
benefit: You're willing to lay down your life for your faith.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must be ordained as a sacred (or profane) champion of your faith by a high-ranking member of its clergy
or Moral Debt background. Such an honor goes above and beyond the normal oaths required of a cleric or paladin

benefit: You commit all your focus to a devastating blow, trying to crush your opponent to the ground.

benefit: In your chest beasts the heart of a wild beast.

or have the Raised by Beasts background

name: Ferocious Action
benefit: You ferocity is quick but shorter lived.

benefit: Your orc heritage allows you to fight on.

name: Ferocious Summons
benefit: Your summoned creatures gain your ferocity.

benefit: You spit in the face of death.

benefit: Your eyes develop keener sight in dim light and darkness.

prerequisites: Con 13; dwarf, half-orc, or orc.
benefit: You can keep fighting even after you should be dead.

prerequisites: Str 15, Int 3; naga, serpentfolk, or creature that has the constrict special attack; Final Embrace; base attack bonus +6.

benefit: Few creatures can survive the crushing horror of your Final Embrace.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or creature that has the constrict special attack

name: Fire Hand
benefit: Born with a torch in your hand, you have a gift with anything that burns.

benefit: Your ability to command fire and bardic music has created a strange blend of both magics.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to cast an arcane fire spell from some other spellcasting class

benefit: You know your way around even magical fire.

benefit: You have mastered fire magic and alchemy.

benefit: You are faster than most.

name: Foeslayer
prerequisites: You must have been defeated and robbed of at least half your possessions by a particular group of humanoids or monstrous humanoids, or have the An Eye for an Eye, Hated Foe, Raiders, or Vengeance background. You may choose a specific race, such as duergar, or a broader group, such as goblinoids. At the GM's option, you may instead choose residents of a particular country, settlement, or tribe.
benefit: Your bitter feud with your enemies can be quenched only with blood.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must have been defeated and robbed of at least half your possessions by a particular group of humanoids or monstrous humanoids
or have the An Eye for an Eye
or Vengeance background. You may choose a specific race
such as goblinoids. At the GM's option
you may instead choose residents of a particular country

name: Following Step

prerequisites: Caster level 7th.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must have suffered permanent memory loss or have the Reincarnated background

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have faced an undead

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or aberration with a CR greater than your level +4
or have the Raised Among the Dead or The Dead One background

benefit: You have learned how to fire the big guns.

benefit: Not only are you a master at taking the initiative, but you can also grant it to someone else.

benefit: You are resistant to poisons, diseases, and other maladies.

benefit: Your rage burns with vast intensity.

benefit: Your eruptions of divine power move your enemies.

benefit: Your masterful shieldwork provides even greater protection to your vital areas.

benefit: Your spells break through spell resistance much more easily than most.

name: Greater Weapon Specialization
prerequisites: Proficiency with selected weapon, Greater Weapon Focus with selected weapon, Weapon Focus with selected weapon, Weapon Specialization with selected weapon, 12th-level fighter.
benefit: Choose one type of weapon (including unarmed strike or grapple) for which you possess the Weapon Specialization feat. Your attacks with the chosen weapon are more devastating than normal.

name: Greater Weapon of the Chosen
prerequisites: Improved Weapon of the Chosen, Weapon Focus with deity's favored weapon, Weapon of the Chosen, worship and receive spells from a deity.
benefit: Your deity guides your hand when you fight with her favored weapon.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Weapon Focus with deity's favored weapon

parsed_prerequisites.detail: worship and receive spells from a deity

name: Greater Whip Mastery
prerequisites: Improved Whip Mastery, Weapon Focus (whip), Whip Mastery, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: You can use a whip to make combat maneuvers with ease.

name: Greater Wild Empathy
prerequisites: Knowledge (nature) 5 ranks, wild empathy class feature.
benefit: Your natural empathy stretches across the world of nature.

name: Groundling
prerequisites: Cha 13, gnome, gnome magic racial trait.
benefit: You can speak with burrowing animals.

name: Grudge Fighter
benefit: You feel great anger at anyone who dares to attack you, and this fury makes your own attacks that much stronger.

name: Gruesome Slaughter
prerequisites: Intimidating Prowess, Killing Flourish, Intimidate 11 ranks, slayer level 11th.
benefit: You can inspire extreme revulsion when you slaughter your enemies.

name: Guardian of the Wild
benefit: Your mystic connection with the wilderness enhances your ability to react to threats.

name: Guided Hand
prerequisites: Channel energy class feature, Channel Smite, proficiency with your deity's favored weapon.
benefit: Your deity blesses any strike you make with that deity's favored weapon.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: proficiency with your deity's favored weapon

name: Guided Hand, Mythic
prerequisites: Guided Hand.
benefit: Attacks made with your deity's favored weapon are divinely inspired.

name: Gunsmithing
benefit: You know the secrets of repairing and restoring firearms.

name: Half-Drow Paragon
benefit: Your drow blood is particularly strong.

name: Hammer the Gap
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You repeatedly strike the same location, causing increasing amounts of damage.

name: Hard-Headed
benefit: Your thick skull is almost a weapon unto itself.

name: Harmonic Sage
prerequisites: Bardic performance class feature, Knowledge (engineering) 5 ranks.
benefit: Your thorough understanding of acoustics in artificial surroundings allows you to improve the power of your bardic performance.

name: Haunted Gnome

benefit: You use your gnome magic to take on an eerie illusory appearance.

prerequisites: Cha 13, gnome magic racial trait, Haunted Gnome, Knowledge (arcana) 3 ranks.
benefit: Discharging your disturbing glamer as you strike a telling blow, you haunt a foe with lingering fear.

prerequisites: Cha 13, gnome magic racial trait, Haunted Gnome, Haunted Gnome Assault, Knowledge (arcana) 6 ranks.
benefit: Your disturbing glamer expands to make your exact location hard to pinpoint.

name: Heavenly Radiance
benefit: Your heavenly light can be used in a variety of ways.

name: Heighten Spell
benefit: You can cast spells as if they were a higher level.

benefit: With a dramatic flourish you display your weapons to the crowd. Onlookers are elated, and your enemies are demoralized.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: and proficiency with the selected weapon. &nbsp

name: Hero's Fortune
benefit: Even at the start of your career, it was clear that you had a chance at greatness, and your legend continues to grow with every adventure.

name: Heroic Defiance
prerequisites: Diehard, Endurance, base Fortitude save +8.
benefit: You struggle on when others would fall.

name: Heroic Defiance, Mythic
prerequisites: Heroic Defiance.
benefit: You ignore harmful effects that would bring others down.

name: Heroic Recovery
prerequisites: Diehard, Endurance, base Fortitude save +4.
benefit: You can throw off the effects of crippling conditions.

name: Heroic Recovery, Mythic

benefit: You can shrug off the effects of harmful conditions after they've taken effect.

name: Heroic Will
benefit: Your indomitable will breaks free from mental shackles.

name: Hex Strike

benefit: When you charge with an ally, you are more deadly.
