benefit: Your mastery of alchemy is nearly supernatural.

name: Master Combat Performer
prerequisites: Performing Combatant or at least three performance feats, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You are a master of the techniques and weapons of the arena and the stage.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Performing Combatant or at least three performance feats

name: Master Craftsman
prerequisites: 5 ranks in any Craft or Profession skill.
benefit: Your superior crafting skills allow you to create simple magic items.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: 5 ranks in any Craft or Profession skill

name: Master Siege Engineer
prerequisites: Siege Weapon Engineer, Knowledge (engineering) 10 ranks.
benefit: You are significantly faster at loading a siege engine, as well as a better shot.

name: Masterful Display
prerequisites: Dazzling Display, any two performance feats.
benefit: You craft a special victory performance that causes the crowd to go wild.

name: Maximize Spell
benefit: Your spells have the maximum possible effect.

name: Maximize Surge, Mythic
prerequisites: 6th mythic tier.
benefit: In times of dire need, you can burn your mythic power to ensure success.

name: Maximized Spellstrike
prerequisites: Maximized magic magus arcana, weapon expertise class feature or Quick Draw.
benefit: You deal brutal damage against opponents caught unawares.

name: Medusa's Wrath
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Gorgon's Fist, Scorpion Style, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: You can take advantage of your opponent's confusion, delivering multiple blows.

name: Medusa's Wrath, Mythic
prerequisites: Medusa's Wrath.
benefit: Your barrage of unarmed attacks builds to a single, staggering strike.

name: Menacing Bane
prerequisites: Bane class feature.
benefit: You are deadly when you team up with allies against a single foe.

name: Merciful Bane
prerequisites: Bane class feature.
benefit: You can use your bane ability to inflict nonlethal damage.

name: Merciful Spell
benefit: Your damaging spells subdue rather than kill.

name: Merciless Butchery
prerequisites: Dastardly Finish, sneak attack +5d6, studied target class feature.
benefit: Your talent for slaughter lets you dispatch helpless opponents before they can recover.

name: Meta Word Mastery
benefit: You are skilled at using meta words to enhance your wordcasting ability.

name: Metallic Wings
benefit: Your wing feathers are made of gleaming metal.

name: Minor Spell Expertise
prerequisites: Ability to cast 4th-level spells.
benefit: You are able to cast a 1st-level spell as a spell-like ability.

name: Missile Shield
prerequisites: Dex 13, Shield Focus.
benefit: You are skilled at deflecting ranged attacks with your shield.

name: Missile Shield, Mythic
prerequisites: Missile Shield.
benefit: Your remarkable awareness allows you to deflect multiple ranged attacks and even ray spells.

name: Mobility
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge.
benefit: You can easily move through a dangerous melee.

name: Mobility, Mythic
prerequisites: Mobility.
benefit: You have perfected your ability to weave through the battlefield, using your momentum to propel yourself far.

name: Mocking Dance
prerequisites: Acrobatics 4 ranks or Perform (dance) 4 ranks.
benefit: You do a little dance that mocks your foe and entertains the crowd.

name: Monastic Legacy
prerequisites: Still mind class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: Your formal unarmed training continues to bolster your training in other areas.

name: Monastic Legacy, Mythic
prerequisites: Monastic Legacy.
benefit: Every new experience carries you another step further along your path to enlightenment.

name: Monkey Moves
prerequisites: Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, Monkey Style, Acrobatics 8 ranks, Climb 8 ranks.
benefit: You scramble around your foes, moving and striking in an erratic fashion.

name: Monkey Shine
prerequisites: Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, Monkey Moves, Monkey Style, Stunning Fist, Acrobatics 11 ranks, Climb 11 ranks.
benefit: You combine acrobatics and opportunity to devastating effect against your opponent.

name: Monkey Style
prerequisites: Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, Acrobatics 5 ranks, Climb 5 ranks.
benefit: Your unarmed fighting style is nimble and unpredictable, full of ground rolls and short leaps.

name: Monument Builder
prerequisites: Knowledge (engineering) 1 rank, and you must have built a structure worth at least 5,000 gp.
benefit: Your inspired architecture shall make your name immortal.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: and you must have built a structure worth at least 5

name: Moonlight Stalker
prerequisites: Int 13, Blind-Fight, Combat Expertise, Bluff 3 ranks, darkvision or low-light vision racial trait.
benefit: You are adept at using shadows to conceal your attacks.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: darkvision or low-light vision racial trait

name: Moonlight Stalker Feint
prerequisites: Int 13, Blind-Fight, Combat Expertise, Moonlight Stalker, Bluff 6 ranks, darkvision or low-light vision racial trait.
benefit: You strike through the shadows so quickly that your opponent can barely react to your attacks.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: darkvision or low-light vision racial trait

name: Moonlight Stalker Master
prerequisites: Int 13, Blind-Fight, Combat Expertise, Improved Feint, Moonlight Stalker, Moonlight Stalker Feint, Bluff 9 ranks, darkvision or low-light vision racial trait.
benefit: You leave your opponents swinging at shadows while you slide elusively through the darkness.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: darkvision or low-light vision racial trait

name: Moonlight Summons
prerequisites: Spell Focus (conjuration), able to cast summon nature's ally.
benefit: Your summoned minions are infused with the power of the moon.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: able to cast summon nature's ally

name: Mother's Gift
benefit: You inherit a special boon from your hag parent.

name: Mounted Archery
prerequisites: Ride 1 rank, Mounted Combat.
benefit: You are skilled at making ranged attacks while mounted.

name: Mounted Archery, Mythic
prerequisites: Mounted Archery.
benefit: Your skill as a rider allows you to take cover and shoot with amazing accuracy.

name: Mounted Combat
prerequisites: Ride 1 rank.
benefit: You are adept at guiding your mount through combat.

name: Mounted Combat, Mythic
prerequisites: Mounted Combat.
benefit: Your ability to maneuver a mount through the rigors of combat is nearly unparalleled.

name: Mounted Shield
prerequisites: Mounted Combat, Shield Focus.
benefit: Your defensive tactics defend both you and your mount.

name: Mounted Skirmisher
prerequisites: Ride rank 14, Mounted Combat, Trick Riding.
benefit: You are adept at attacking from upon a swift moving steed.

name: Multiattack
prerequisites: Three or more natural attacks.
benefit: This creature is particularly skilled at making attacks with its natural weapons.

name: Multitalented Mastery
benefit: You are adept at numerous disciplines.

name: Multiweapon Fighting
prerequisites: Dex 13, three or more hands.
benefit: This multi-armed creature is skilled at making attacks with multiple weapons.

name: Murderer's Circle
prerequisites: Dodge, Acrobatics 4 ranks.
benefit: After savaging your foe, you circle like a hunter ready for the kill.

name: Murmurs of Earth
benefit: The earth opens up her secrets to your perceptions.

name: Mystic Stride
prerequisites: Dex 15, Nimble Moves, woodland stride class feature.
benefit: Enchanted vegetation does not bar your path.

name: Mythic Companion, Mythic
prerequisites: You must be non-mythic.
benefit: Despite your non-mythic nature, you're a vital part of the greater mythic world.

name: Mythic Crafter, Mythic
prerequisites: Any item creation feat.
benefit: You can craft mythic magic items.

name: Mythic Paragon, Mythic
benefit: Your mythic power is even more potent than that of most other mythic beings.

name: Mythic Spell Lore, Mythic
prerequisites: Ability to cast spells.
benefit: You have learned how to unlock the power of your spells, combining them with your mythic power.

name: Nation Builder
prerequisites: You must have explored and claimed an area of at least 100 square miles.
benefit: The land calls to you to conquer it and forge a realm all your own.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have explored and claimed an area of at least 100 square miles

name: Natural Charmer
benefit: You possess some of the dominating powers of your vampire progenitor.

name: Natural Spell
prerequisites: Wis 13, wild shape class feature.
benefit: You can cast spells even while in a form that cannot normally cast spells.

name: Natural Spell, Mythic
prerequisites: Natural Spell.
benefit: You can speak and use some magic items when you use wild shape.

name: Nature Magic
prerequisites: Knowledge (nature) 1 rank.
benefit: You are able to use simple spells by drawing on nature's raw majesty.

name: Neckbreaker
prerequisites: Bonebreaker, Greater Grapple, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, Jawbreaker, Stunning Fist, Heal 12 ranks.
benefit: With a quick jerk, you snap an enemy's neck.

name: Neither Elf nor Human
benefit: You have removed yourself from your heritage so thoroughly that even magic does not recognize you.

name: Nemesis
prerequisites: You must have at least one enemy who wishes to cause you great harm. If you have multiple enemies, the GM may keep the specific nemesis secret, or have many of your enemies work together against you. If your nemesis is not already a challenging foe, it either advances in strength to become a challenging foe or allies with others to achieve a higher challenge rating.
benefit: A past enemy seeks your ruin.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must have at least one enemy who wishes to cause you great harm. If you have multiple enemies
the GM may keep the specific nemesis secret
or have many of your enemies work together against you. If your nemesis is not already a challenging foe
it either advances in strength to become a challenging foe or allies with others to achieve a higher challenge rating

name: Net Adept
prerequisites: Exotic Weapon Proficiency (net), base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You have trained to use the net as a melee weapon.

name: Net Maneuvering
prerequisites: Exotic Weapon Proficiency (net), Net Adept, base attack bonus +3.
benefit: With sweeping movements and brute force, you can use your net to put foes at a disadvantage.

name: Net Trickery
prerequisites: Exotic Weapon Proficiency (net), Net Adept, Net Maneuvering, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You have become very proficient at using your net to hinder your enemies.

name: Net and Trident
prerequisites: Dex 15, Exotic Weapon Proficiency (net), Net Adept, Two-Weapon Fighting.
benefit: Your skill with lighter weapons allows you to wield one alongside your net.

name: Nightmare Fist
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Intimidate 1 rank, ability to create magical darkness.
benefit: You are even more deadly in magical darkness.

name: Nightmare Striker
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Nightmare Fist, Nightmare Weaver, Stunning Fist, Heal 5 ranks, ability to cast faerie fire.
benefit: Your faerie fire not only illuminates your foes, but it also shows you their weaknesses.

name: Nightmare Weaver
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Nightmare Fist, Intimidate 2 ranks, ability to cast darkness.
benefit: You can use your ability to create magical darkness to terrorize enemies.

name: Nimble Moves
prerequisites: Dex 13.
benefit: You can move across a single obstacle with ease.

name: Nimble Moves, Mythic
prerequisites: Nimble Moves.
benefit: You dance across obstacles with ease, as though they weren't even there.

name: Nimble Striker
benefit: You were born to charge your enemies and nobody does it better.

name: No Name
prerequisites: Grit class feature or Amateur Gunslinger feat, Bluff 4 ranks.
benefit: You don't need an elaborate disguise to keep your identity under wraps.

name: Noble Spell Resistance
benefit: Your ascension is complete; you have the spell resistance approaching that of a demon.

name: Opening Volley
benefit: Your ranged assault leaves your foe disoriented and vulnerable to your melee attack.

name: Oracular Intuition
prerequisites: Mystery class feature.
benefit: You are highly sensitive to magic and changes in a person's demeanor.

name: Orator
prerequisites: Skill Focus (Linguistics).
benefit: You're able to construct statements and commands that are much more convincing than their content would otherwise suggest.

name: Orc Hewer
benefit: You are ferocious at hewing your enemies, especially orcs.

name: Orc Weapon Expertise
benefit: You can do more with the weapons orcs favor the most.

name: Oread Burrower
benefit: The ground parts for you at the slightest touch, allowing you to dig with great speed.

name: Oread Earth Glider
benefit: The earth welcomes you, showing you the secret paths through sand and soil.

name: Outflank
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +4.
benefit: You look for every edge when flanking an enemy.

name: Pack Attack
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You are skilled at surrounding your enemies.

name: Pack Flanking
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, ability to acquire an animal companion.
benefit: You and your companion creature are adept at fighting together against foes.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to acquire an animal companion

name: Painful Anchor
prerequisites: Anchoring aura class feature.
benefit: Evil outsiders take damage when they attempt to connect to other planes.

name: Paired Opportunists
benefit: You know how to make an enemy pay for lax defenses.

name: Panther Claw
prerequisites: Wis 15, Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike, Panther Style.
benefit: You unleash a rapid series of blows on foes that attempt to attack you when you move.

name: Panther Parry
prerequisites: Wis 15, Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike, Panther Claw, Panther Style.
benefit: Your vicious strikes impair your foe's ability to attack you when you move.

name: Panther Style
prerequisites: Wis 13, Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: You can strike back at enemies who attack you when you move.

name: Paralyzing Strike
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +14.
benefit: Finding just the right pressure point, you paralyze your foe with a single hit.

name: Parry Spell
prerequisites: Spellcraft 15 ranks, Improved Counterspell .
benefit: You can throw an enemy spell back at its caster.

name: Parting Shot
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge, Mobility, Point Blank Shot, Shot on the Run, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You are an expert skirmisher, able to rain missiles upon your enemies whether advancing or retreating.

name: Pass For Human
prerequisites: Half-elf, half-orc, or halfling (see Special).
benefit: You're easily mistaken for a human rather than a member of your own race.

name: Passing Trick
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Dodge, Improved Feint, Mobility, size Small or smaller.
benefit: Slipping past a foe gives you the chance to feint.

name: Penetrating Strike
prerequisites: Weapon Focus, base attack bonus +1, 12th-level fighter, proficiency with weapon.
benefit: Your attacks are capable of penetrating the defenses of some creatures.

name: Penetrating Strike, Mythic
prerequisites: Penetrating Strike.
benefit: You know just how to strike to bypass even the most heavily armored foe's defenses.

name: Perfect Strike
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: When wielding a monk weapon, your attacks can be extremely precise.

name: Performance Weapon Mastery
benefit: You wield all your weapons with the flair of a performer.

name: Performing Combatant
prerequisites: Dazzling Display, any one performance feat.
benefit: You treat every combat as a performance, bringing flare and showmanship.

name: Persistent Spell
benefit: You can modify a spell to become more tenacious when its targets resist its effect.

name: Persuasive
benefit: You are skilled at swaying attitudes and intimidating others into your way of thinking.

name: Persuasive, Mythic
prerequisites: Persuasive.
benefit: You're a master of persuasion, be it with soothing words or harsh barking commands.

name: Piercing Spell
benefit: Your studies have helped you develop methods to overcome spell resistance.

name: Pin Down
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes, fighter level 11th.
benefit: You easily block enemy escapes.

name: Pinning Knockout
prerequisites: Dex 13, Greater Grapple, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.
benefit: An opponent you have pinned is easy for you to knock out.

name: Pinning Rend
prerequisites: Dex 13, Greater Grapple, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.
benefit: You tear flesh when you damage an opponent that you have pinned.

name: Pinpoint Poisoner
prerequisites: Poison use class feature, Craft (alchemy) 6 ranks, Adder Strike, Improved Unarmed Strike, Two-Weapon Fighting or flurry of blows class feature.
benefit: You deftly use specially prepared needles to apply poison for maximum effect.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Two-Weapon Fighting or flurry of blows

name: Pinpoint Targeting
prerequisites: Dex 19, Improved Precise Shot, Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, base attack bonus +16.
benefit: You can target the weak points in your opponent's armor.

name: Pinpoint Targeting, Mythic
prerequisites: Pinpoint Targeting.
benefit: Your attacks can home in on your opponent's weak spot and ignore many defenses.

name: Planar Preservationist
prerequisites: Preservationist alchemist archetype.
benefit: You know how to preserve and reconstitute extraplanar monsters as well as normal animals.

name: Planar Wild Shape
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, Knowledge (planes) 5 ranks.
benefit: You can infuse your wild shape with planar strength.

name: Point Blank Master
prerequisites: Weapon Specialization with selected ranged weapon.
benefit: You are adept at firing ranged weapons in close quarters.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Weapon Specialization with selected ranged weapon

name: Point-Blank Shot
benefit: You are especially accurate when making ranged attacks against close targets.

name: Point-Blank Shot, Mythic
prerequisites: Point-Blank Shot.
benefit: Your accuracy with ranged attacks is unmatched at point-blank range.

name: Pommel Strike Deed
prerequisites: Amateur Swashbuckler or panache class feature; base attack bonus +3.
benefit: With a surprise swipe with your pommel, you can topple a foe.

name: Potent Surge, Mythic
benefit: Your surge is more potent.

name: Power Attack
prerequisites: Str 13, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You can make exceptionally deadly melee attacks by sacrificing accuracy for strength.

name: Power Attack, Mythic
prerequisites: Power Attack.
benefit: Your attacks are truly devastating.

name: Powerful Shape
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, druid level 8th.
benefit: Your wild shapes are mighty and muscular.

name: Powerful Shape, Mythic
prerequisites: Powerful Shape.
benefit: The forms you take in wild shape tower over their natural counterparts.

name: Practiced Tactician
prerequisites: Tactician class feature.
benefit: With only a few quick gestures and commands, you can direct others in combat.

name: Precise Shot
prerequisites: Point-Blank Shot.
benefit: You are adept at firing ranged attacks into melee.

name: Precise Strike
prerequisites: Dex 13, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You are skilled at striking where it counts, as long as an ally distracts your foe.

name: Preferred Spell
prerequisites: Spellcraft 5 ranks, Heighten Spell.
benefit: You find it very easy to cast one particular spell.

name: Prodigy
benefit: You are naturally skilled at arts, professions, and the acquisition of knowledge.

name: Prone Shooter
prerequisites: Weapon Focus (crossbow or firearm), base attack bonus +1.
benefit: While prone, you use the ground to stabilize your aim while using a crossbow or firearm.

name: Prone Slinger
benefit: Your sideways sling release allows you to launch bullets and stones even while prone.

name: Prophet
prerequisites: Ability to cast divine spells, and you must either have received a vision from your god (or another appropriate supernatural entity) or have the Marked by the Gods background.
benefit: The truth has been revealed, and you have been chosen to deliver it.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: and you must either have received a vision from your god (or another appropriate supernatural entity) or have the Marked by the Gods background

name: Prophetic Visionary
prerequisites: Mystery class feature.
benefit: Your oracular abilities give you a glimpse into the future.

name: Prophetic Visionary, Mythic
prerequisites: Prophetic Visionary.
benefit: Your precognitive powers aid you further.

name: Pummeling Bully
prerequisites: Improved Reposition, Improved Trip, Improved Unarmed Strike, Pummeling Style; base attack bonus +9, brawler level 5th, or monk level 5th.
benefit: Your punch has the chance to trip or move your target.

name: Pummeling Charge
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Pummeling Style; base attack bonus +12, brawler level 8th, or monk level 8th.
benefit: Your charge ends with a mighty haymaker.

name: Pummeling Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike; base attack bonus +6, brawler's flurry class feature, or flurry of blows class feature.
benefit: You collect all your power into a single vicious and debilitating punch.

name: Punishing Kick
prerequisites: Con 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: Your kicks are so powerful you use them to push or knock back your foes.

name: Pure Faith
prerequisites: Divine health class feature.
benefit: Not only are you immune to disease, like most paladins, but you also are highly resilient to poisons.

name: Pushing Assault
prerequisites: Str 15, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: A strike made with a two-handed weapon can push a similar sized opponent backward.

name: Quarterstaff Master
prerequisites: Weapon Focus (quarterstaff), base attack bonus +5.
benefit: You can wield a quarterstaff as either a two-handed or one-handed weapon.

name: Quick Bull Rush
prerequisites: Str 13, Improved Bull Rush, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You can barrel into your opponent and follow this with an attack.

name: Quick Channel
prerequisites: Knowledge (religion) 5 ranks, channel energy class feature.
benefit: Your divine energies flash with dazzling speed.

name: Quick Dirty Trick
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Dirty Trick, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You can perpetrate a dirty trick and deliver an attack before your opponent is the wiser.

name: Quick Drag
prerequisites: Str 13, Improved Drag, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You drag your enemy and deliver a punishing blow.

name: Quick Draw
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You can draw weapons faster than most.

name: Quick Draw, Mythic
prerequisites: Quick Draw.
benefit: You can retrieve any item quickly, not just weapons.

name: Quick Reposition
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Reposition, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Your opponent becomes an unwitting dance partner, following your lead while you fight.

name: Quick Steal
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Steal, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You are adept at relieving foes of their belongings even while you strike.

name: Quick Wild Shape
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, caster level 8th.
benefit: You sacrifice power for speed in changing form.

name: Quicken Blessing
prerequisites: Access to a blessing's major power, blessings class feature.
benefit: You can deliver one of your blessings with greater speed.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Access to a blessing's major power

name: Quicken Spell
benefit: You can cast spells in a fraction of the normal time.

name: Quicken Spell-Like Ability
prerequisites: Spell-like ability at CL 10th or higher.
benefit: This creature can use one of its spell-like abilities with next to no effort.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Spell-like ability at CL 10th or higher

name: Racial Heritage
prerequisites: Human.
benefit: The blood of a non-human ancestor flows in your veins.

name: Racial Heritage, Mythic
prerequisites: Racial Heritage.
benefit: Your racial heritage mingles with your mythic power to become more pronounced.

name: Radiant Charge
prerequisites: Lay on hands class feature.
benefit: When you charge, you do so with the power of faith.

name: Rage Casting
prerequisites: Blood casting class feature.
benefit: Your blood is raw and potent power, and you can burn it to empower your spells.

name: Raging Absorption
prerequisites: Ability to cast 2nd-level bloodrager spells, bloodrage class feature.
benefit: You can absorb hostile spell energy to refuel your continued bloodrage.

name: Raging Blood
prerequisites: Eldritch Heritage or sorcerer bloodline class feature.
benefit: Your blood boils with latent energy, filling you with an intense fury.

name: Raging Brutality
prerequisites: Str 13, rage class feature, Power Attack, base attack bonus +12.
benefit: You expend some of your rage to strike your opponents with a more powerful weapon blow.

name: Raging Concentration
prerequisites: Blood casting class feature.
benefit: When you are in the heat of rage, not even pain can break your concentration.

name: Raging Deathblow
prerequisites: Greater rage class feature.
benefit: Every killing blow gives you a surge of vitality, further fueling your rage.

name: Raging Hurler
prerequisites: Rage class feature, Throw Anything.
benefit: An opponent can do little to evade your wrathful pitching of weapons and objects.

name: Raging Throw
prerequisites: Str 13, Con 13, rage class feature, Improved Bull Rush, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You expend some of your rage to throw one opponent at another.

name: Raging Vitality
prerequisites: Con 15, rage class feature.
benefit: While raging, you are full of vigor and health.

name: Ranged Study
prerequisites: Weapon Focus with the chosen weapon, studied combat class feature.
benefit: You can use a limited form of studied combat and studied strike with a weapon of your choice.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Weapon Focus with the chosen weapon

name: Rapid Grappler
prerequisites: Dex 13, Greater Grapple, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.
benefit: You are a quick hand at grappling.

name: Rapid Reload
prerequisites: Weapon Proficiency (crossbow type chosen) or Exotic Weapon Proficiency (firearm).
benefit: Choose a type of crossbow (hand, light, heavy) or a single type of one-handed or two-handed firearm that you are proficient with. You can reload such a weapon quickly.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Weapon Proficiency (crossbow type chosen) or Exotic Weapon Proficiency (firearm)

name: Rapid Reload, Mythic
prerequisites: Rapid Reload.
benefit: You can reload any type of weapon with astounding speed.

name: Rapid Shot
prerequisites: Dex 13, Point-Blank Shot.
benefit: You can make an additional ranged attack.

name: Rapid Shot, Mythic
prerequisites: Rapid Shot.
benefit: You can fire many times each round with amazing precision.

name: Ray Shield
prerequisites: Dex 15, Missile Shield, Spellbreaker.
benefit: You can even deflect rays with your shield.

name: Razortusk
prerequisites: Half-orc.
benefit: Your powerful jaws and steely teeth are deadly enough to give you a bite attack.

name: Reach Spell
benefit: Your spells go farther than normal.

name: Reactive Healing
prerequisites: Quick Channel or Quicken Spell; channel energy or lay on hands class feature.
benefit: You can channel healing energy in response to an attack that would knock you unconscious.

parsed_prerequisites.name: channel energy or lay on hands

name: Realistic Likeness
benefit: When you are in human form, you can take the shape of a specific individual.

name: Rebounding Leap
prerequisites: Leaping lance class feature, Acrobatics 5 ranks, Ride 11 ranks.
benefit: Your riding and lancing expertise allows you to enter and leave the saddle with great speed.

name: Rebuffing Reduction
prerequisites: Str 13, damage reduction, Improved Bull Rush, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: Your damage reduction can turn the force of blows back on your enemies.

name: Reckless Rage
prerequisites: Power Attack; rage or raging song class feature.
benefit: Your boundless rage grants your blows extra strength, though at the expense of accuracy.

name: Recovered Rage
prerequisites: Rage or raging song class feature.
benefit: You regain rounds of rage or raging performance when you drop a foe.

name: Redemption
prerequisites: You must have lost class features by violating the code of conduct of a class that possesses such a code, or have the Dishonored Family background.
benefit: Your past failure haunts you and drives you on.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or have the Dishonored Family background

name: Remote Bomb
prerequisites: Delayed bomb discovery.
benefit: You can set off your delayed bombs at great distances.

name: Rending Claws
prerequisites: Str 13, two claw natural weapon attacks, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Your claw attacks do greater harm to your enemy.

name: Rending Fury
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +6, rend special attack.
benefit: You easily tear your enemies limb from limb with your natural attacks.

name: Repositioning Strike
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Trip, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Your critical hits can move your foes where you wish.

name: Resilient Armor
prerequisites: Divine bond (armor or shield), or sacred armor class feature.
benefit: When you enhance your armor or shield, you gain a measure of damage reduction.

name: Resilient Brute
benefit: You absorb punishment others find deadly.

name: Resilient Eidolon
prerequisites: Eidolon class feature.
benefit: Your link with your eidolon is strong enough that it can remain with you for a short time after you fall unconscious or are killed.

name: Resolute Rager
benefit: Fear passes quickly while you are raging.

name: Revelation Strike
prerequisites: Revelation class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: Your unarmed strike brings a revelation down upon your foe.

name: Reverse-Feint
benefit: You can goad an opponent into attacking you in order to make your counter attack all the more powerful.

name: Reward of Grace
prerequisites: Lay on hands class feature.
benefit: When you lay on hands, divine energy ripples through you, granting you grace.

name: Reward of Life
prerequisites: Lay on hands class feature.
benefit: When you lay on hands, you are also healed.

name: Rhetorical Flourish
prerequisites: Cha 13, Persuasive.
benefit: You rapidly change topics and employ confusing rhetoric to distract people from your true intent.

name: Rhetorical Flourish, Mythic
prerequisites: Rhetorical Flourish.
benefit: You're supremely skilled at using verbal misdirection and finesse to influence others.

name: Ricochet Shot Deed
prerequisites: Grit class feature or Amateur Gunslinger feat, Blind-Fight.
benefit: You can ricochet a firearm shot off the wall and still hit your target.

name: Ricochet Splash Weapon
prerequisites: Dex 13, Throw Anything.
benefit: Even when your thrown splash weapons miss, they are especially dangerous.

name: Ride-By Attack
prerequisites: Ride 1 rank, Mounted Combat.
benefit: While mounted and charging, you can move, strike at a foe, and then continue moving.

name: Ride-By Attack, Mythic
prerequisites: Ride-By Attack.
benefit: You can make multiple attacks as you ride past your enemies.

name: Righteous Healing
prerequisites: Judgment class feature.
benefit: Your healing spells are more potent when you have a judgment active.

name: Rime Spell
benefit: Creatures damaged by your spells with the cold descriptor become entangled.

name: Risky Striker
benefit: You can make yourself a little more vulnerable to larger creatures in order to land a devastating blow.

name: Riving Strike
prerequisites: Arcane Strike, ability to cast arcane spells.
benefit: When you infuse your weapon with arcane might, your attacks make foes more susceptible to magic.

name: Run
benefit: You are swift of foot.

name: Run, Mythic
prerequisites: Run.
benefit: You run with preternatural speed and endurance.

name: Sacred Summons
prerequisites: Aura class feature, ability to cast summon monster.
benefit: The minions of your divine patrons stand ready to answer your call.

name: Sap Adept
prerequisites: Sneak attack +1d6.
benefit: You know just where to hit to knock the sense out of your foe.

name: Sap Master
prerequisites: Sneak attack +3d6, Sap Adept.
benefit: You knock the sense out of foes with a well-timed surprise attack.

name: Savage Display
prerequisites: Dazzling Display.
benefit: With your victory and a roar, you push yourself on with increased savagery.

name: Saving Shield
prerequisites: Shield Proficiency.
benefit: You deflect attacks that could mean your ally's death.

name: Saving Shield, Mythic
prerequisites: Saving Shield.
benefit: Shielding a comrade from harm gives you a chance to strike back.

name: Scavenger's Eye
benefit: Your gaze is naturally drawn to valuable glittering objects.

name: School Strike
prerequisites: Wizard school class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: You focus the secrets of your school of wizardry into your unarmed strike.

name: Scorching Weapons
benefit: Elemental fire stirs within your body, boiling your blood and rendering you resistant to flame.

name: Scorpion Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: You can perform an unarmed strike that greatly hampers your target's movement.

name: Scorpion Style, Mythic
prerequisites: Scorpion Style.
benefit: Your unarmed strikes can induce a near-crippling lethargy in your enemies.

name: Scribe Scroll
prerequisites: Caster level 1st.
benefit: You can create magic scrolls.

name: Sea Hunter
benefit: Your blows knock swimming opponents off balance.

name: Sea Legs
prerequisites: Profession (sailor) 5 ranks.
benefit: You have a sailor's instincts for moving about while aboard seagoing vessels.

name: Second Chance
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Quick reflexes turn missed strikes into second chances.

name: Secret Stash Deed
prerequisites: Grit class feature or Amateur Gunslinger feat, Sleight of Hand 1 rank.
benefit: You are so skilled at stashing small packets of firearm ammunition and black powder on your person that you sometimes surprise yourself when you find them.

name: Seen and Unseen
benefit: Your anonymity makes you difficult to find through magical or mundane means, and you have learned how to combat both of your progenitor races.

name: Seething Hatred
prerequisites: Studied target class feature.
benefit: You've learned to channel your hatred of a particular type of creature into a devastating strike.

name: Seize Advantage
prerequisites: Opportune parry and riposte deed.
benefit: You can take advantage of your foes when they overcommit on their attacks.

name: Seize the Moment
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes, Improved Critical.
benefit: You and your allies are poised to pounce whenever one of you scores a telling blow.

name: Selective Channeling
prerequisites: Cha 13, channel energy class feature.
benefit: You can choose whom to affect when you channel energy.

name: Selective Channeling, Mythic
prerequisites: Selective Channeling.
benefit: When you exclude creatures from your channel, you empower those you do affect.

name: Selective Spell
prerequisites: Spellcraft 10 ranks.
benefit: Your allies need not fear friendly fire.

name: Self-Sufficient
benefit: You know how to get along in the wild and how to effectively treat wounds.

name: Self-sufficient, Mythic
prerequisites: Self-Sufficient.
benefit: Independence comes naturally to you, and you have mastered taking care of yourself.

name: Sense Link
prerequisites: Bond senses class feature.
benefit: When you and your eidolon share senses, your combined minds grant you exceptional powers of observation.

name: Shadow Caster
benefit: Your command over shadow and darkness create longer-lasting spell effects.

name: Shadow Ghost
benefit: You can move between the Shadow Plane and the Material Plane more often.

name: Shadow Strike
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You accurately strike even those you cannot clearly see.

name: Shadow Walker
benefit: You can pierce the veil between the Shadow Plane and the Material Plane more often, and to greater effect.

name: Shadowy Dash
benefit: In dim light, you resemble little more than a shadow.

name: Shaitan Earthblast
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 17, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, Shaitan Skin, Shaitan Style, base attack bonus +13 or monk level 11th.
benefit: With a forceful stomp you release a blast of acid from the earth to burn your enemies.

name: Shaitan Skin
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 15, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, Shaitan Style, base attack bonus +11 or monk level 9th.
benefit: You can manipulate acid to shield yourself and disable your enemies.

name: Shaitan Style
prerequisites: Con 13, Wis 15, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 5th.
benefit: You strike with the caustic forces from within the earth.

name: Shake It Off
benefit: You support your allies and help them recover from crippling effects.

name: Shamed
prerequisites: You must have been publicly embarrassed, or must have the Bastard Born background. If the embarrassment didn't cause significant harm to your personal honor or social standing, it does not qualify for the feat prerequisites. The humiliation doesn't need to have been unjustified.
benefit: A past humiliation haunts you to this day.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have been publicly embarrassed

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or must have the Bastard Born background. If the embarrassment didn't cause significant harm to your personal honor or social standing
it does not qualify for the feat prerequisites. The humiliation doesn't need to have been unjustified

name: Shapeshifter Foil
prerequisites: Knowledge (arcana) 5 ranks or Knowledge (nature) 5 ranks, ability to use any polymorph effect.
benefit: Your command of shapeshifting magic can disrupt similar effects in others.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to use any polymorph effect

name: Shapeshifting Hunter
prerequisites: Favored enemy class feature, wild shape class feature.
benefit: You blend your knowledge of foes and your shapeshifting abilities together.

name: Shaping Focus
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, Knowledge (nature) 5 ranks.
benefit: Your powers of shapeshifting outstrip your dabbling in the druidic faith.

name: Share Healing
prerequisites: Ability to acquire an animal companion, eidolon, familiar, or special mount.
benefit: Your link with your companion creature allows you to share with it any healing magic that's cast upon you.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Ability to acquire an animal companion

name: Shared Insight
prerequisites: Wis 13, half-elf.
benefit: You deftly direct others' attentions where you wish.

name: Shared Judgment
prerequisites: Second judgment class feature.
benefit: You extend the benefits of your judgment to an ally.

name: Shared Manipulation
benefit: You can subtly bolster allies' ability to misdirect and infuriate their enemies.

name: Sharp Senses
prerequisites: Keen senses racial trait.
benefit: Your senses are especially sharp, even for your kind.

name: Sharpclaw
benefit: Your nails are large and strong.

name: Shatter Defenses
prerequisites: Weapon Focus, Dazzling Display, base attack bonus +6, proficiency with weapon.
benefit: Your skill with your chosen weapon leaves opponents unable to defend themselves if you strike them when their defenses are already compromised.

name: Shatter Defenses, Mythic
prerequisites: Shatter Defenses.
benefit: Your dazzling attacks leave your opponents flummoxed and bewildered, unable to attack you or to defend themselves effectively.

name: Shatterspell
benefit: Your mighty blows shatter your enemy's magic.

name: Shield Focus
prerequisites: Shield Proficiency, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You are skilled at deflecting blows with your shield.

name: Shield Focus, Mythic
prerequisites: Shield Focus.
benefit: You're a master of using your shield for protection.

name: Shield Master
prerequisites: Improved Shield Bash, Shield Proficiency, Shield Slam, Two-Weapon Fighting, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: Your mastery of the shield allows you to fight with it without hindrance.

name: Shield Proficiency
benefit: You are trained in how to properly use a shield.

name: Shield Slam
prerequisites: Improved Shield Bash, Shield Proficiency, Two-Weapon Fighting, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: In the right position, your shield can be used to send opponents flying.

name: Shield Slam, Mythic
prerequisites: Shield Slam.
benefit: Your shield bash produces a powerful kick.

name: Shield Specialization
prerequisites: Proficiency with selected shield, Shield Focus, fighter level 4th.
benefit: You have mastered the use of one type of shield.

name: Shield Wall
prerequisites: Shield Proficiency.
benefit: You form a unified defense with those around you.

name: Shield of Swings
prerequisites: Str 13, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: A wild frenzy of attacks serves to bolster your defenses.

name: Shielded Caster
benefit: Your allies cover you while you cast complicated spells.

name: Shot on the Run
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge, Mobility, Point-Blank Shot, base attack bonus +4.
benefit: You can move, fire a ranged weapon, and move again before your foes can react.

name: Shot on the Run, Mythic
prerequisites: Shot on the Run, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: With ease, you can snap off two shots while dashing across the battlefield.

name: Sickening Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: Your critical hits cause opponents to become sickened.

name: Sickening Spell
benefit: You can sicken creatures with your spells.

name: Sidestep
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge, Mobility.
benefit: You can reposition yourself after a foe's missed swing.

name: Siege Commander
prerequisites: Craft (siege weapon) 5 ranks, Knowledge (engineering) 5 ranks or Profession (siege engineer) 1 rank.
benefit: Under your leadership, the time required to assemble and move a siege engine is greatly reduced.

name: Siege Engineer
prerequisites: Knowledge (engineering) 5 ranks or Profession (siege engineer) 5 ranks, proficiency with one siege engine.
benefit: You are proficient with all siege weaponry.

name: Siege Gunner
prerequisites: Siege Engineer, Profession (siege engineer) 5 ranks.
benefit: Aiming outsized siege weapons poses little difficulty for you.

name: Signature Deed
prerequisites: Grit class feature, gunslinger level 11th.
benefit: You are known for performing a particular deed, and can perform it with greater ease.

name: Silent Kill
prerequisites: Stealth 12 ranks; assassinate advanced slayer talent or ninja master trick.
benefit: You are quite adept at killing your prey without making noise or alerting others.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: assassinate advanced slayer talent or ninja master trick

name: Silent Spell
benefit: You can cast your spells without making any sound.

name: Simple Weapon Proficiency
benefit: You are trained in the use of basic weapons.

name: Sin Seer
prerequisites: Detect undead paladin class feature.
benefit: Unlike others who have taken the oath against undeath (see page 60), your preoccupation with the undead does not cloud your view of good and evil.

name: Skald's Vigor
prerequisites: Raging song class feature.
benefit: Your song and your enthusiasm combine to invigorate you in battle.

name: Skeleton Summoner
prerequisites: Spell Focus (necromancy), ability to cast summon monster.
benefit: The walking dead respond to your call.

name: Skill Focus
benefit: Choose a skill. You are particularly adept at that skill.

name: Skill Focus, Mythic
prerequisites: Skill Focus.
benefit: You mastery with this skill is unmatched, even in difficult situations.

name: Skilled Driver
benefit: Choose a type a type of vehicle (either air, land, or water). You are more skilled when driving that vehicle.

name: Skilled Rager
prerequisites: Rage class feature.
benefit: With practice, you've mastered your rage to allow yourself more versatility.

name: Slashing Grace
prerequisites: Dex 13, Weapon Finesse, Weapon Focus with chosen weapon.
benefit: You can stab your enemies with your sword or another slashing weapon.

name: Slayer's Feint
prerequisites: Dex 15, Acrobatic or slayer level 1st, Combat Expertise, Acrobatics 1 rank.
benefit: You rely on your deceptive speed and agility instead of trickery to catch your opponents unprepared.

name: Slayer's Knack
prerequisites: Favored enemy class feature, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You know how to battle your favored enemies with such efficacy that any weapon you wield against them becomes more deadly.

name: Sleep Venom
benefit: You can change the nature of your toxic spittle to put your enemies to sleep.

name: Sling Flail
prerequisites: Weapon Focus (sling), base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You can use your loaded sling to effectively strike at nearby foes.

name: Slow Faller
prerequisites: Acrobatics 5 ranks or slow fall class feature.
benefit: You can reduce the amount of falling damage you take when you are close to a wall.

name: Smash
prerequisites: Power Attack, half-orc.
benefit: You overcome obstacles by breaking them.

name: Smell Fear
prerequisites: Keen Scent, half-orc or orc.
benefit: You can catch the sour scent of fear on the wind.

name: Snake Fang
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike, Snake Sidewind, Snake Style, Acrobatics 6 ranks, Sense Motive 9 ranks.
benefit: You can unleash attacks against an opponent that has dropped its guard.

name: Snake Sidewind
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Snake Style, Acrobatics 3 ranks, Sense Motive 6 ranks.
benefit: Your sensitive twisting movements make you difficult to anticipate combat.

name: Snake Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Acrobatics 1 rank, Sense Motive 3 ranks.
benefit: You watch your foe's every movement and then punch through its defense.

name: Snap Shot
prerequisites: Dex 13, Point-Blank Shot, Rapid Shot, Weapon Focus, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: With a ranged weapon, you can take advantage of any opening in your opponent's defenses.

name: Snapping Turtle Clutch
prerequisites: Snapping Turtle Style, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +3 or monk level 3rd.
benefit: Your unarmed style allows you to turn your opponent's attack into an opportunity.

name: Snapping Turtle Shell
prerequisites: Snapping Turtle Clutch, Snapping Turtle Style, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +5 or monk level 5th.
benefit: Your guarding hand is almost magical in its skill at deflecting incoming blows.

name: Snapping Turtle Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +1 or monk level 1st.
benefit: Your deft unarmed style allows you to shield your body from harm.

name: Snatch
prerequisites: Size Huge or larger.
benefit: This creature can grab other creatures with ease.

name: Snatch Arrows
prerequisites: Dex 15, Deflect Arrows, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: Instead of knocking an arrow or ranged attack aside, you can catch it in mid-flight.

name: Snatch Arrows, Mythic
prerequisites: Snatch Arrows.
benefit: You can use the weapons you pluck from the air to immediately make melee attacks.

name: Sneaking Precision
prerequisites: Sneak attack class feature, Critical Focus, any critical feat, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Your knowledge of your enemies' vulnerable spots is especially punishing.

name: Sociable
prerequisites: Cha 13, half-elf.
benefit: You have a way of helping others to get along.

name: Sociable, Mythic
prerequisites: Sociable.
benefit: Your easy nature flows from you without effort, putting others at ease.

name: Sorcerous Bloodstrike
prerequisites: Cha 13, sorcerer bloodline class feature.
benefit: You can regain power when you kill a creature.

name: Sorcerous Strike
prerequisites: Sorcerer bloodline class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: The power flowing through your veins also flows through your unarmed strike.

name: Spell Bane
prerequisites: Bane class feature.
benefit: While your bane weapon is active, creatures that your bane affects find it more difficult to resist your spells.

name: Spell Bluff
prerequisites: Bluff 5 ranks, Spellcraft 5 ranks.
benefit: You know the principles of arcane dueling, and when fighting other spellcasters, you have learned to hide the true nature of your spells until the last possible moment.

name: Spell Focus
benefit: Choose a school of magic. Any spells you cast of that school are more difficult to resist.

name: Spell Focus, Mythic
prerequisites: Spell Focus.
benefit: Your magical specialties are particularly effective.

name: Spell Hex
prerequisites: Major hex class feature.
benefit: You can transform a 1st-level spell into a hex.

name: Spell Mastery
prerequisites: 1st-level wizard
benefit: You have mastered a small handful of spells, and can prepare these spells without referencing your spellbooks at all.

name: Spell Mastery, Mythic
prerequisites: Spell Mastery.
benefit: You're so familiar with certain spells you can prepare them with the greatest of ease.

name: Spell Penetration
benefit: Your spells break through spell resistance more easily than most.

name: Spell Penetration, Mythic
prerequisites: Spell Penetration.
benefit: Your mythic power breaches your enemies' defenses.

name: Spell Perfection
prerequisites: Spellcraft 15 ranks, at least three metamagic feats.
benefit: You are unequaled at the casting of one particular spell.

name: Spell Specialization
prerequisites: Int 13, Spell Focus.
benefit: Select one spell. You cast that spell with greater than normal power.

name: Spellbreaker
prerequisites: Disruptive, 10th-level fighter.
benefit: You can strike at enemy spellcasters who fail to cast defensively when you threaten them.

name: Spellbreaker, Mythic
prerequisites: Spellbreaker.
benefit: You're a spellcaster's worst nightmare.

name: Spellsong
prerequisites: Cha 13, bardic performance class ability, able to cast 1st-level spells.
benefit: You can blend the power of your performance and spellcasting.

name: Spider Step
prerequisites: Acrobatics 6 ranks, Climb 6 ranks, monk level 6th.
benefit: Your physical mastery grants you an impossible stride.

name: Spider Step
benefit: You tread where only arachnids dare.

name: Spider Summoner
benefit: You gain the ability to summon powerful spiders.

name: Spinning Throw
prerequisites: Combat Expertise, Improved Bull Rush, Improved Trip, Improved Unarmed Strike, Ki Throw.
benefit: You whirl your foe around and then let go.

name: Spirit Talker
prerequisites: Hex class feature; shaman level 6th or witch level 6th.
benefit: By forging a temporary bond with a spirit, you gain access to an unfamiliar hex.

name: Spirit of the Wild
benefit: Your mystic connection with one type of wilderness has grown even stronger.

name: Spirit's Gift
prerequisites: Animal companion class feature or familiar class feature.
benefit: You commune with a spirit of your choice, and it grants your animal companion or familiar a boon.

name: Spirited Charge
prerequisites: Ride 1 rank, Mounted Combat, Ride-By Attack.
benefit: Your mounted charge attacks deal a tremendous amount of damage.

name: Spirited Charge, Mythic
prerequisites: Spirited Charge.
benefit: Your mounted charge knocks the wind and wits from those foolish enough to stand against you.

name: Spiritual Guardian
prerequisites: Ability to cast spiritual weapon or spiritual ally, spirit magic class feature.
benefit: Your spiritual guardians are more powerful than those of most others.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Ability to cast spiritual weapon or spiritual ally

name: Spit Venom
benefit: You have mastered the nagaji warrior technique of spitting venom into your opponent's eyes.

name: Splintering Weapon
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +1, proficient with weapon, weapon made of primitive material.
benefit: Your fragile weapon works to your advantage, breaking off fragments in wounds you inflict.

name: Split Hex
prerequisites: Witch level 10th.
benefit: You can split the effect of one of your targeted hexes, affecting another creature you can see.

name: Split Major Hex
prerequisites: Split hex, caster level 18th.
benefit: You can split the effect of one of your targeted hexes, affecting another creature you can see.

name: Spontaneous Metafocus
prerequisites: Cha 13, one metamagic feat, able to spontaneously cast spells.
benefit: You can focus to combine one of your known spells and metamagic feats.

name: Spontaneous Metafocus, Mythic
prerequisites: Spontaneous Metafocus.
benefit: You apply metamagic to your spells with greater ease than do other spontaneous casters.

name: Spontaneous Nature's Ally
prerequisites: Knowledge (nature) 5 ranks, ability to spontaneously cast cure or inflict spells, Animal or Plant domain.
benefit: Instead of casting a cure spell, you can instead cast summon nature's ally.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to spontaneously cast cure or inflict spells

name: Spring Attack
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge, Mobility, base attack bonus +4.
benefit: You can deftly move up to a foe, strike, and withdraw before he can react.

name: Spring Attack, Mythic
prerequisites: Spring Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You move across the battlefield in a blur of whirling blades.

name: Stabbing Shot
prerequisites: Rapid Shot, elf.
benefit: You can clear the way to continue using your bow.

name: Stage Combatant
prerequisites: Weapon Focus, base attack bonus +5
benefit: You are a master of stage and nonlethal combats.

name: Staggering Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, base attack bonus +13.
benefit: Your critical hits cause opponents to slow down.

name: Staggering Fist
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +2.
benefit: When you engage in unarmed combat, you know just where to strike to stagger your foe.

name: Stalker's Focus
prerequisites: Knowledge (nature) 3 ranks, Survival 3 ranks, no levels in a class that has the animal focus class  feature.
benefit: Your affinity to the natural world allows you to adopt the focus of a single animal.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: no levels in a class that has the animal focus class  feature

name: Stalwart
prerequisites: Diehard, Endurance, base attack bonus +4.
benefit: You adopt a defensive stance that allows you to absorb and redirect hits.

name: Stand Still
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes.
benefit: You can stop foes that try to move past you.

name: Starlight Summons
prerequisites: Spell Focus (conjuration), able to cast summon nature's ally.
benefit: Your summoned minions slink along under the shadows of the stars.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: able to cast summon nature's ally

name: Steadfast Personality
benefit: You rely on your assuredness and sense of self to help keep your mind clear.

name: Stealth Synergy
benefit: Working closely with an ally, you are able to move like twin shadows.

name: Stealthy
benefit: You are good at avoiding unwanted attention and slipping out of bonds.

name: Stealthy, Mythic
prerequisites: Stealthy.
benefit: Your grace and fluidity are beyond compare.

name: Steam Caster
benefit: You imbue your fire spells with elemental water, transforming them into powerful gouts of steam.

name: Steel Soul
prerequisites: Dwarf, hardy racial trait.
benefit: You are especially resistant to magic.

name: Step Up
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +1.
benefit: You can close the distance when a foe tries to move away.

name: Step Up and Strike
prerequisites: Dex 13, Following Step, Step Up, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: When a foe tries to move away, you can follow and make an attack.

name: Still Spell
benefit: You can cast spells without moving.

name: Stoic Pose
benefit: You can hold yourself as still as a statue, evading detection.

name: Stone Sense
prerequisites: Improved Stonecunning, Perception 10 ranks.
benefit: You can feel movement in the very earth and stones around you.

name: Stone Singer
prerequisites: Cha 13, bardic performance class feature, dwarf.
benefit: Your songs are in accordance with the ways and lands of your people.

name: Stone-Faced
prerequisites: Dwarf.
benefit: Rocks show more expression than you.

name: Stony Step
benefit: The earth recognizes its kinship with you and does not impede your movement.

name: Stouthearted
prerequisites: Raging song class feature.
benefit: You fight back your fear by voicing the song in your heart.

name: Strangler
prerequisites: Dex 13, sneak attack +1d6, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: Throttling the life out of enemies is second nature to you.

name: Stretched Wings
benefit: You strengthen your crippled wings.

name: Strike Back

benefit: You can strike at foes that attack you using their superior reach, by targeting their limbs or weapons as they come at you.

name: Strike Back, Mythic
prerequisites: Strike Back.
benefit: Your precise counterattacks degrade your foes' advantages in combat.

name: Strong Comeback
benefit: You learn quickly from past mistakes.

name: Strong Comeback, Mythic
prerequisites: Strong Comeback.
benefit: You never make the same mistake twice.

name: Stronghold
prerequisites: You must have the Leadership feat and must lead at least 10 combat-capable followers (such as fighters or rangers).
benefit: You seek to build a bastion against which your enemies shall break like water against the rocks.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: You must have the Leadership feat and must lead at least 10 combat-capable followers (such as fighters or rangers)

name: Studied Combatant
prerequisites: Int 13, Amateur Investigator, base attack bonus +6, 1 rank in at least one Knowledge skill, no levels in a class that has the inspiration class feature.
benefit: Your inspiration guides your strikes when you take a moment to assess your foe.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: 1 rank in at least one Knowledge skill

parsed_prerequisites.name: no levels in a class that has the inspiration

name: Stunning Assault
prerequisites: Str 13, Power Attack, base attack bonus +16.
benefit: You powerful but imprecise attacks can stun your enemies.

name: Stunning Critical
prerequisites: Critical Focus, Staggering Critical, base attack bonus +17.
benefit: Your critical hits cause opponents to become stunned.

name: Stunning Fist
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: You know just where to strike to temporarily stun a foe.

name: Stunning Fist, Mythic
prerequisites: Stunning Fist.
benefit: With greater potency and frequency, your fists stun those who stand against you.

name: Stunning Pin
prerequisites: Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, Stunning Fist.
benefit: You can render a pinned foe temporarily incapacitated.

benefit: Whenever you summon your eidolon, it is more powerful for a brief period of time.

benefit: Your critical hits can sunder your foes' weapons.

prerequisites: Augment Summoning, caster level 3rd.

benefit: Your quick reflexes and skill at climbing keep you from falling to your doom.

name: Sure and Fleet

name: Surprise Follow-Through

benefit: You are skilled at changing places with your ally during a chaotic melee.

name: Sympathetic Rage
benefit: Seeing an ally rage fills you with your own fury.

name: Tail Terror
benefit: You have strengthened your tail enough to make slap attacks with it.

name: Talented Magician
prerequisites: Major magic rogue talent, minor magic rogue talent. Benefit: You gain an additional daily use of each of your minor magic and major magic rogue talents.
benefit: Roguish magic comes easily to you.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: minor magic rogue talent. Benefit: You gain an additional daily use of each of your minor magic and major magic rogue talents

name: Tandem Trip

name: Tangle Feet
benefit: Creatures who cross your path find themselves tripping over their own feet.

name: Tenacious Survivor
benefit: Your spirit lingers long after any other's would have passed on.

name: Tenacious Transmutation
prerequisites: Spell Focus (transmutation).
benefit: Your mastery of the magic of changing makes your transmutations more durable.

name: Tengu Raven Form
benefit: You can shift into the form of a giant black raven.

benefit: You can grow wings that allow you to fly.

benefit: You can blend the power of arcane and divine magic.

name: Thief of Legend
prerequisites: You must have stolen at least 1,000 gp worth of treasure without being caught and kept mementos of these thefts worth at least 500 gp, or have the Greed background.
benefit: More than just a burglar, you aspire to commit crimes of legendary stature.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have stolen at least 1

parsed_prerequisites.detail: 000 gp worth of treasure without being caught and kept mementos of these thefts worth at least 500 gp

prerequisites: Discern lies class feature.
benefit: Thinking back, you discover a lie in what you once thought to be words of truth.

name: Threnodic Spell
prerequisites: Knowledge (religion) 6 ranks, Spell Focus (necromancy).
benefit: You can convert mind-affecting magic to necromantic power capable of controlling undead.

benefit: Killing fuels your rage.

name: Throw Anything
benefit: You are used to throwing things you have on hand.

benefit: You're so skilled at throwing weapons that it hardly matters what you throw.

benefit: You can conjure your spells into existence with blaring thunder or fearful shrieks, deafening creatures damaged by their effects.

benefit: You can sacrifice multiple attacks to make a single devastating strike.

benefit: Your unarmed strikes are as precise as they are powerful, but they leave you open and you can pursue foes with blinding speed.

benefit: Your unarmed fighting style emulates the strength and ferocity of a tiger.

benefit: Your critical hits cause opponents to become fatigued.

name: Titan Strike, Mythic

benefit: Your fists can fell titanic foes.

name: Toppling Spell
benefit: Your spells with the force descriptor knock the affected creatures prone.

benefit: With a single touch you can reduce the threat of even the most savage of foes.

name: Toughness
benefit: You have enhanced physical stamina.

name: Toughness, Mythic
prerequisites: Toughness.
benefit: You have legendary resilience and durability.

name: Tower Shield Proficiency
prerequisites: Shield Proficiency.
benefit: You are trained in how to properly use a tower shield.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or you must have the Bounty Hunter or Champion of the People background

benefit: Your system recuperates from the effects of poisons with astonishing speed.

name: Tree Hanger
benefit: You can use your tail to defend against trip attacks and to hang from nearby protrusions.

name: Trick Riding
prerequisites: Ride 9 ranks, Mounted Combat.
benefit: You are not only skilled at controlling a horse in combat; you can make it look like art.

name: Tripping Staff, Mythic
prerequisites: Tripping Staff.
benefit: Your staff is valuable for attack and defensive balance.

name: Tripping Strike
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Trip, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: The force intrinsic to your critical hits can knock your foes down.

prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Trip, Tripping Staff, Weapon Focus (quarterstaff), Weapon Specialization (quarterstaff), base attack bonus +12.
benefit: You can make a trip attack with a quarterstaff on all adjacent enemies.

name: Triton Portal
benefit: You can channel your inner magic to summon allies.

prerequisites: You must have found love with a person you can't be with, have a current lover, or have the Current Lover, For Love, or The Lover background. Possible complications include distance, your love being with another, your feelings being unrequited, or your relationship being forbidden.
benefit: You found love, only to have it denied by the cruelty of fate.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have found love with a person you can't be with

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or The Lover background. Possible complications include distance

name: Tunnel Rat
benefit: You are a master of fighting in confined spaces.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Two-Weapon Fighting or flurry of blows
Weapon Focus with both wielded weapons

benefit: Your dual bludgeoning strikes are especially deadly when you are fighting giants.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Improved Two-Weapon Fighting and Two-Weapon Fighting
Weapon Focus with both wielded weapons

prerequisites: Dwarf or gnome; defensive training racial trait; Improved Two-Weapon Fighting and Two-Weapon Fighting, or flurry of blows class feature; Twin Thunders; Twin Thunders Flurry; Weapon Focus with both wielded weapons; base attack bonus +9.
benefit: With thunderous simultaneous strikes, you can batter a mighty giant into submission.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Improved Two-Weapon Fighting and Two-Weapon Fighting
Weapon Focus with both wielded weapons

benefit: You can fool two opponents with a single feint.

benefit: Your quick reflexes and dexterous movements make up for your lack of stamina.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have a close relative

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or other person dear to your heart who never returned from a journey

or have the Raiders or Vengeance background

parsed_prerequisites.detail: must worship and receive spells from a deity

This acts as an attack of opportunity, and counts against the number of attacks of opportunity you can make each round. Additionally, once per day when a melee attack deals enough damage to knock you unconscious or kill you, the attacker must succeed at a Fortitude saving throw (DC = 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Wisdom modifier) or be stunned for 1 round. This save occurs after you make the retaliatory unarmed strike granted by the Linnorm Vengeance feat.
